items.name: Alstroemania
items.lore: Look around and observe! An overcast sky; yet the blue of day seeps through the gloom, illuminating the land around you. A patch of weeds; yet flowers bloom vividly in spite of the wretched foliage surrounding them. The struggles of nature create your own personal utopia. A world, tailormade, just for you. Only you.

items.name: Arbiter of Iridescence
items.lore: Inevitable, that your colors will fade and your hubris will cost you everything.

items.name: Crown of Jewels
items.lore: A symbol of authority, power, and the right to rule. Let Her leadership burn brightly forevermore, leading us into a new era of strength.

items.name: Dreamer's Soul
items.lore: The world is only as small as your heart makes it out to be.

items.name: Embrittlement
items.lore: Shards of frost and bone, fragments of memories and worlds; it all shatters under your step. The cracks reach deep. Too deep. Your soul rests on thin ice.

items.name: Excision of Trust
items.lore: They'll never believe you again.

items.name: Heretic
items.lore: What once crowned the Commander of Aelumia's Gendarmerie, now reduced to a singed fragment of its former self.

items.name: Nasins' Nadir
items.lore: Always remember. Never forgive.

items.name: Phanerozoic
items.lore: An age of transformation. To shape the evolution of life, as if molding a piece of clay. To gain intelligence, and become the harbingers of creation and destruction. To build control, and become the hand of fate. Here, we begin.

items.name: Planet Buster
items.lore: With each swing, this ornate hammer threatens to shape mountains and carve valleys, cleaving new fault lines in a single blow.

items.name: Renascence
items.lore: No more dreams. Not after what you've been through.

items.name: Restitution
items.lore: recnal il il. alac toc, pasad il, atlruc il, kaclahpokc il cefos. lahes il nikcrolad kec pahsofmal uc ifrah tofnikcsif. etlefrofmad uc, etlaces uc tofnikcsoftahal. rofmel lahrakctriltod uc tofpahnuc. lahic cof efrofmad il pahsadiled uc tofifrah. etlalnes ah rofmedes uc tofpestal. pasad uc tofmahatskritsec. etlrakc kec. etlrakc kec.

items.name: Reverence
items.lore: A molten bracer decorated with royal ornaments, it exudes an aura of uncontested superiority. Indeed, wearing it breeds only admiration from the masses who stand below you, fueling your rise to the top.

items.name: Rewritten History
items.lore: Alter your past to reshape your future.

items.name: Shattered Aurora
items.lore: The shifting mosaic that graces the winter skies has always struck you as a faint trace of some grand precursor, pure and whole. As you look up at what remains, fragmented beyond the horizon, you can't help but wonder what it would take to break it once more.

items.name: Static Cling
items.lore: Forged in a hidden workshop, these boots were imbued with earthen quartz and bound lightning. Their wearer crackles with static energy, amplifying every strike. Many have chased this power, only to find themselves uprooted by its shocking embrace.

items.name: The Peak
items.lore: Looking over the horizon, you suddenly realize the span of your journey. How far you've come. How far you'll go.

items.name: Unforeseen Ends
items.lore: It doesn't matter that you meant well.

items.name: Valediction
items.lore: Your magic pops open the locket, revealing an inscription inside: necel il lokc tahnulpef cef. priftac ilis las uc traspedis ac ickah il necel nedrid uc akcnofmosed. tahrefets il kacetslah pahpestal, luh necel ciltuh il pecetslah nikcpelasred cefos. tof hocelkif ac cef kal, etlsul uc nikcpahsofmalec. tah il tof toc kahatsnus.

items.name: Vilavud Os
items.lore: Your world crumbles around you even as your senses heighten. Get out while you still can.

items.name: Arcane Apparatus
items.lore: Originally intended for a more benign purpose, this piece of royal technology has been repurposed by something with far more malicious intentions. Despite the electrified water spraying from it, the smell of death never seems to wash away.

items.name: Calculated Sacrifice
items.lore: A true tactician knows to throw even himself on the pyre, if it is for the greater good.

items.name: Catabolysis
items.lore: Soldiers training in extreme cold conditions often push themselves beyond the limits. This however is not sustainable, as their bodies frantically scramble for survival.

items.name: Clandestine
items.lore: This bracelet holds a hastily scrawled diagram and message: tahkuhac ah pichul il nikckrah ceftif, necal cistodes il pahnikcredos. pulits pices il tahkuhac il pahnifkel sef icetlis pruts, hatl nec niftocos. tof il recnal toc rofmedos. nikcred kalkah, its kalahretsed nofmales uc lasec tofsifos.

items.name: Crumbler
items.lore: There is no need to swing this weapon. Your skin crackles as the mere presence of the blade rends the earth beneath it, to falling skies and gaping chasms. Once the dust settles and the air stills, the sword is the only telltale remnant of the catastrophe.

items.name: Devil's Oath
items.lore: Branded on your skin reads: "No refunds!"

items.name: Dormancy
items.lore: Lines of text crisscross an ornate runic design: etlpasad uc kod ah krof cof nifah lasifrah. etlatlruc uc pah cof okcah lasifrah. etlpecoles uc elracits toc nucah lasifrah.

items.name: Eschaton
items.lore: The end comes in threes: first a deep and neverending shadow, suffocating all within its grasp. Then, a piercing blinding radiance, overtaking all within its sight. Finally, the in-between: chaos, bloodshed, war, a conflict which will sweep the land. Each end inevitable; but none a guarantee.

items.name: Firewall
items.lore: Some places must be protected at all costs. In a frigid, worldwide desert of apathy and ruination, there somehow still remain some oases of love and warmth. Keep them safe, as long as you can.

items.name: Hellbound
items.lore: Face the flames with resolution in your eyes. Once you're down in the brimstone, you're not going back.

items.name: Hubris
items.lore: You stand at the top of the world, but the only way forward is down.

items.name: Nexus
items.lore: Where thought converges, the veil thins.

items.name: Palimpsest
items.lore: Beneath engravings of the Fruman capital, you can make out some text: nikcatl rakc il las uc kractif petstac ah krof cef. etlpices ah tahkuhac il kacetslah pahsecnof, luh nasef il tul kalofmes kacetslah toc nikckrof. tah il necel ledokcrid uc pestalos ac il las uc krahitsahosed, luh etlpasad il nikcpahsofmalos sef pecol uc traspedis, pactef tah il lah toc las uc uskadis.

items.name: Panopticon
items.lore: There is nothing in these walls that will remain hidden forever. Nothing unaccounted for by the gleaming light of The Citadel.

items.name: Sea of Fire
items.lore: An oasis of flame, where noone can hurt you. Through abhorrence and loathing, you may create a world where all things burn, and a perfectly beautiful world it will be indeed.

items.name: Spectral Psalm
items.lore: Do you recognize the cries before you? Those so far beneath you, forgotten by time and betrayed by history. Hear their song- of asylum lost and vengeance unfulfilled. Bring them closure.

items.name: Ad Marem
items.lore: The sea is the wisest of masters. It has been here for a million years since and will be here for a million years hence. Those who care to learn its secrets can become themselves enlightened. Stay by the waves a moment; they will fill your mind with wonder, if you are willing to listen.

items.name: Carcinogen
items.lore: Ancient scholars claim the malevolent fungus within its plates feeds on the host's life force, granting unspeakable toxic power in return. Yet every wearer risks wasting away from the inside out.

items.name: Chaos Theory
items.lore: War does not bring destruction. With war comes chaos, and with chaos comes destruction.

items.name: Claustropelia
items.lore: The swirl of liquid muck drags you further, further down, into the grasping clutches of the gluttonous hands of the sludge. The earth must be fed; preferably, by something less powerful than you.

items.name: Folds of Infinity
items.lore: Lose yourself in the climb.

items.name: Greaves of Purest Obsidian
items.lore: Sleek black plates, harder than steel, tougher than granite. Threads of ancient magick weave themselves through the material, granting you all the power of the dark stone.

items.name: Halcyon
items.lore: As a flashing star shot through the night sky, a sole observer witnessed its brilliance. It was then, wreathed in prismatic light, he decided. Someday, he would shine as bright as that star, and overtake those beneath him. No matter the cost.

items.name: Inhumanity
items.lore: Exploitation is a game as old as time, but rarely one to be played so transparently. When war reaches your doorstep, though, the facade of civility falls-there is no shame in bleeding an enemy dry.

items.name: Light of The Wings
items.lore:
"Against all heed, to Fruma eternal."
The engraving appears extremely weathered.

items.name: Malocchio
items.lore: Carved from a deep-sea gemstone laced with arcane wards, this pendant twists malevolent stares back upon their source, leaving the bearer unscathed.

items.name: Messenger
items.lore: This rather nondescript band has something etched into the inside, almost too small to make out: nasef kec. nah il kaclof toc profrets adnales recnal nec niftoc. nah il pahisah nikcol ah krof kacetslah cef. ahas nifloc pokc il sofmalis pokces toc cef. tah il cistod uc secnof if ef reftif, nah il tahes uc kacetslah pahisah sef krahos. tahes il hocel uc sifed if.

items.name: Orogenesis
items.lore: True artistry takes time... with the power to sculpt mountains and erode cliffsides into panoramas, the beliefs of your enemies are insignificant. They will understand your greatness... in due time.

items.name: Regal Sceptre
items.lore: Finally, the pulse of melody and harmony flies through golden halls, flung by the momentum of life itself. A single knock of polished wood on chiselled stone, and the song of the world falls silent.

items.name: Sepulchral Shackles
items.lore: The grave leaves its mark on any who have been there. Few make it out; fewer still can bring their minds, too, back to life.

items.name: Soul Unmade
items.lore: Your mind is ripped away from reality, puppeting the ghost of a vessel that once held your brilliant spirit. But here, now, you can do things you never before thought possible. They cannot touch you here, here in the realm where the shadows live.

items.name: Astrolabe
items.lore:
There is an ornate inscription entwined with a runic design on the back.
necel il etlduhsulludaces kec keslud cef. duhesnef il nahes toc netl ifikc uc kricr lifrah.
14  7al sifkel

items.name: Golden Staff
items.lore: Pitch black and tipped with golden bands, it appears to grow at its wielder's whim. Strange runes are etched into the side, that flash with a heavenly light.

items.name: Incognito
items.lore: She wears a dozen masks, each fragile as the surface of a lake. The shards of her discarded personage are sharp enough to kill.

items.name: Iron Medallion
items.lore: A gift from Her Majesty to The Iron Commander in recognition of his accomplishments. If only he knew what it represented...

items.name: Jurisdiction
items.lore: Soldiers and sorcerers, mere men who think themselves judgement. Not so. Judgement is beyond the sword, beyond the staff; justice prefers different weapons. There is nothing, nothing at all, out of its reach.

items.name: Lunar Acropolis
items.lore: The mirror at the core of this artefact reflects back an image of a citadel that does not exist anywhere on this planet.

items.name: Proterozoic
items.lore: An age of oxidation. To assert that you will remain, and others all across the world will be left behind. To overwhelm everything with toxic air, ensuring that extinctions follow your wake. Some stop breathing, but the gears of time march on.

items.name: Purple Prose
items.lore: Your disputatious adversaries blanch at your consummate pugnacious ability, and, naturally, your superlative nous.

items.name: Retired Vigour
items.lore: There was glory in this place, once. Life, vitality, springing forth from every well and boulder. No longer. All that remains now is death, and a fleeting memory of that which once was.

items.name: Reviled Saviour
items.lore: You will do what is right, whether they like it or not.

items.name: Ruinous
items.lore: To fight for a cause so overwhelmingly greater than themselves, under that lofty, unreachable banner. What will they do if it all comes crumbling down; when beliefs and ideals rot away, reduced to naught but ash?

items.name: Serene Storm
items.lore: Barrages of rain and ice can bite and break; symphonies thunder and wind can deafen and crash. The worst storms, though, the kind that leave no survivors; those creep up quietly, steal in through the moonlit fields, and whisk the world away without a trace.

items.name: Starcaller
items.lore: From afar, a faint light glimmers. A brighter light next. Another. Then another still. A cascade of blinding force, more than anything you could have ever imagined. And then... nothing. As though there was never anything there.

items.name: Transfiguration
items.lore: Desperation breeds creativity. What would it take to force your will upon the world? To bend and break and weave existence, to bypass the immutable? The result is different, wrong, anathema to your being... but it is freedom from the chains that bind you. It is enough.

items.name: Wysteria Glooms
items.lore: Every stride leaves a footstep of violet, trailing your path. The flower buds peek out of the ground as if nervous, and after a moment's hesitation, burgeon -- blooming hysteria into the hearts of man.

items.name: Xiuhtecuhtli
items.lore: This turquoise mask burns into your skin, binding flesh and stone. The flames are a constant reminder of the balance between creation and destruction, and that the fire which sustains can also consume.

items.name: Breath of the Skies
items.lore: The frozen drops lashing your skin. The roar of the wind filling your ears. You've mastered it all. You can shape the winds, direct the rain. You are the storm.

items.name: Carcinization
items.lore: You awake in a cold sweat, finding yourself in control of two more arms and a hard exterior. You cannot make any sense of what is happening inside yourself. You cannot even explain it to yourself. How about you sleep a little bit longer and forget all this nonsense?

items.name: Deep Breaths
items.lore: Stay calm and stay in control. The hardest fights cannot be won by chance alone.

items.name: Enshrouded Eruption
items.lore: Recovered from subterranean ash deposits, these timeworn greaves are one of many relics of war buried in combat by an ancient eruption.  Entombed by millennia of rock and soil, the ideologies of the belligerents have been long forgotten: all that remains is their endless desire for absolution.

items.name: Final Spark
items.lore: You have gotten tired of the abyss staring back. Embrace it in a finale that leaves no survivors.

items.name: Hydrotoxemia
items.lore: Only years of training, of building tolerance, has allowed you resistance to the onslaught; channeling the unstoppability of a torrent unleashed. Your enemy stands no chance.

items.name: Queen Bee's Call
items.lore: A single insect is simple. Perhaps lost, perhaps helpless. But their purpose is immutable over all. If they are to be summoned, then they are to stand. If they are to be asked the impossible, then they are to strike regardless.

items.name: Rhyolitic Wrath
items.lore: A rage has built up in the stones around you. A slow burn, a creeping fury gradually grown throughout the ages. It demands release.

items.name: Scattered Psyche
items.lore: The whispers crescendo to cackles, creeping cries clouding your mind. You can't think. They eat away at the edges of your consciousness. You can't think. It's too loud in your brain. You can't think.

items.name: Sonic Wave
items.lore: This pike carries an insatiable momentum. The blade darts through the air, slicing through the wind with a speed so great the air screams in protest, a roaring echo to be heard miles away.

items.name: Umbral Anchor
items.lore: To drag into shadow. To stifle in darkness. Anything is possible with total, suffocating eclipse at your beck and call.

items.name: Vengeance
items.lore: A strength fueled by rage, merciless, unending. A hatred, all-consuming, that erodes all other thought, all sense of being. An ally so fickle, so selfish, that leaves you aimless at the moment of pyrrhic triumph.

items.name: Archean
items.lore: An age of inundation. To overwhelm a vicious hell with immense waves, and protest the hand of fate. To harbor the beginning of life, and nurture a world of growth. From the fire, we are born.

items.name: Bated Breath
items.lore: The show is about to begin.

items.name: Drenched Igneous
items.lore: Found at the bottom of a hydrothermal trench, this incredibly dense stone has been warped and shifted into the shape of armor, containing the strength of the Earth, its water, and all of its awe-inspiring heat.

items.name: Ehrfurcht
items.lore: The world is a well of wonder. To open your eyes each day is the greatest gift that can be given. The strength of a thousand lives flows through your veins, and the world embraces you with a reckless, terrible, beautiful, incredible power.

items.name: Faction
items.lore: Linked by blood, common cause, or pure fate, the clan is an immutable unit. Hundreds of hearts, beating as one, a collective pulse with the power to shake the world to its core.

items.name: Frenetic Firestorm
items.lore: It invites you to ride on the warm, soothing gusts it summons. It calls for you to admire the fires it leaves behind, burning the land to a char in its wake. It offers a lifetime of protection, while weaving a tapestry of flames across the world.

items.name: Heart of Shadow
items.lore: Two sides of the same coin.

items.name: Mistweb Spinner
items.lore: To hunt in the Mistwoods is always an opportunity. Perhaps hidden between the trees, behind the shrubs, above the canopy, or even within the shadows just behind you, mirroring your every step.

items.name: Mothwing Cloak
items.lore: Threaded with strands of silk from a giant moth, it allows the wearer to dash through the air.

items.name: Nihil
items.lore: A string so subtle it can slip by the walls of reality, bringing its targets into the space beyond space itself.

items.name: Occultation
items.lore: This ornate knife, which fell from Ahmsord centuries ago, is still followed by the shadows of the void, blotting out the sun in a wide area around it. Bathed in the darkness of twilight, you finally feel truly liberated, as no soul will ever see the horrors you commit.

items.name: Shogun
items.lore: The law of the ancients was clear on the matter. The law of the jungle was, too. Tradition and nature agree: power can only be held by those with the strength to wield it.

items.name: Slaying Moon
items.lore: Abandon your fear. Look forward. Move forward and never stop. Retreat and you will age. Hesitate and you will die.

items.name: Song of the Sea
items.lore: A sweet tune permeates the air. A whistle on the waves; a melody from the depths. It calls forth destruction in seafoam and sand, and those who hear its call do not breathe for long.

items.name: Threshold of Consciousness
items.lore: The lights slowly begin to wink out, one by one. You don't have much time left at all.

items.name: Timeskip
items.lore: Chronological anomalies sometimes split themselves open, with no rhyme or reason. Catch one at the right time, and you'll find yourself somewhen else.

items.name: Brilliant Waves
items.lore: The storm is a wicked beast, built of buffeting gales and electric agony. But at the very heart of the tempest lies a sanctuary, a blink of respite, where the waves run radiant in every hue.

items.name: Dawn Chaser
items.lore:
On the base of this ancient staff, a faded inscription surrounds a carving of an empty nest: 
las ah sifpas il lelis, pactef nikcpadpets tofcef.
luh prifad il kahnukc krad, nikckrahad il pahudef.
kisal luh udpets tofcef, luh tofnikclotsecisah.
tof il trasped lokc  cof, priftastah uc tofsascah.
8  5al sifkel

items.name: Gambler's Ruin
items.lore: Those who believe in chances are the most foolish - every step forward is a step closer to demise. Greed blinds their eyes, as it guides their souls to eternal despair.

items.name: Hypsophobia
items.lore: Standing hundreds of metres in the sky, the mist hides the ground far below you. Every step must be taken with caution, or else-

items.name: Incoherence
items.lore: Trapped within the deep reaches of the void holes for millenia, this ancient relic has been unrecognizably warped by its own nonexistence. Instead of integrating back to reality upon its return, it brings with it the manic dissociation from a world that cannot be understood.

items.name: Iterative Loop
items.lore: Tinkerers in the Roughworks often repeatedly augment obsolete parts in search of new innovations and capabilities. Their handiwork, an example of which rests upon your finger, compels you to continue the repetition and break new boundaries.

items.name: Latent Disorder
items.lore: A rage unseen, yet so beautiful, that when you laid your eyes upon it, you knew it had to be unleashed. No matter the cost.

items.name: Mark of the Huntsman
items.lore: They tense. They know they must hide. The bow will see to it. You will seek. You will find them. The bow will see to it. They will heed your call. They will know your face. The bow will see to it.

items.name: Masterwork Epoch
items.lore: This ornate bow holds a sinister beauty. Each rediscovery marks impending disaster, against any force that attempts to overcome it. Such is the inevitability of fate: irreverent to the will of masses, an epoch starts anew.

items.name: Moonscorched Amulet
items.lore: Some of the many superstitions floating around the Fruman redwoods surround the reflective stone of this necklace. Those who stare at it claim to see a twisted version of themselves staring back, one that amplifies the deepest shortcomings of the viewers' souls.

items.name: Null Space
items.lore: What's the point of your journey if it all just leads to nothing?

items.name: Samsara
items.lore: Countless lifetimes flash by in an instant. Will you break the cycle, or be consumed by the tides of eternity?

items.name: Stalking Mist
items.lore: akc il sascah ah ludadheftalhahes cof pahef cef, luh  ifikc uc setlrekc trasped. las il palad aces il kif nikcpichul toc  uc trasped, pactef nahes il pichul cef. las il nikcpaladah sef icetl aces il itspahisahad toc atsif luh halatsif, luh nahes il kelcifif uc nikcisahed.

items.name: Totalitarian
items.lore: Her trial was rigged from the start. She deserved no justice for the things they claimed she did. The prison is her world now, the burden on her soul matched now only by the weight of the iron chain around her neck.

items.name: Toxic Spike
items.lore: A hissing, cracking harmony swells, a maddening chorus to blare across the broken plains, yet still: unseen and alive, it swells with the beat of the earth, still breathing, still killing.

items.name: Autopilot
items.lore: Wouldn't it be nice to just let go and let something else take the wheel every now and then?

items.name: Carole
items.lore: Just another song and dance.

items.name: Champion's Valiance
items.lore: These leggings were forged in honour of a martyr, who, legend has it, fought off a horde of the marauders for two days without food or rest to defend his village.

items.name: Ellipsism
items.lore: I can't see this through to the end. I have to put my trust in you to finish it.

items.name: Firemoss Lyre
items.lore: A defiant pang joins the ruckus, a tune to run counter to the pain and the chaos of the rest. The strings of the forest are played just so, and the fall of each leaf echoes in an enchanted rhythm.

items.name: Horamancer
items.lore: To quell the most hateful energies, to focus the most erratic wills, to understand the most alien voices, to shake the most uncaring forces, to capture the most ephemeral potential. The final work of many scholars: to command the world in its most pure being.

items.name: Last Sun
items.lore: The falling sun shall be your demise.

items.name: Masterwork Cataclysm
items.lore: Despite the existence of the Nether Portal, few believe that it is possible to open such rifts with sheer force alone. None believe that a tool with enough power to accomplish such a monumental feat could exist. And yet...

items.name: Masterwork Immolation
items.lore: The act of self-immolation is never taken lightly, and is always a sacrifice. This idol was carved to honor one such instance, in which a master of flame burned through his life force in a final act of heroism-purging an encroaching army of the undead, saving the people of the jungle from destruction.

items.name: Arcana
items.lore: The power of the unknown. The mysteries hidden in dark corners, between the walls; the forgotten poems, the renounced names, the words spoken into the abyss and never heard again. Meld them, wield them; they are yours to command.

items.name: Arsene
items.lore: I am thou... Thou art I.

items.name: Ascendancy
items.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.

items.name: Biohazard
items.lore: Archers have often experimented with tipped arrows. Launching the substance itself, however, is an innovation. A viscous ooze corrosive to anything it touches, it remains to be seen if their remains will be seen.

items.name: Dreamstealer
items.lore: Infiltrating a mind is tricky business; warping its thoughts, taking its wishes. It requires precision, skill, and more than a fair bit of luck.

items.name: Eternal Toil
items.lore: Shift after shift, the workers gave everything they had. Quota after quota, even that was not enough. They could only take so much of this before their very spirit was forever broken.

items.name: Hadean
items.lore: An age of formation. To spark the chain reaction of everything, and to predate nothing. To bombard the world with violent impact after violent impact, building a beautiful, delicate foundation from the firestorm of the cosmos. All things must begin.

items.name: Inordinate
items.lore: Excessive force is an ideal to strive for. Disproportionate violence is your right to protect.

items.name: Last Stand
items.lore: You're the only one left. The only light remaining to lift this world out of endless night. Push on; one day, you may make it.

items.name: Techno-Blade
items.lore: He never dies.

items.name: Tectonics֎
items.lore: The stones have a language. You can learn to direct their shiftings and discover their names; all you must do in return is forget your own.

items.name: Bartered Memory
items.lore: Your wit picked bare, the raw burn of reality exposing your fresh warped self to the world. Your abilities magnified, a new power ripping free from under your skin. You have traded your mind for something far, far greater.

items.name: Confiscated
items.lore: She's taken all you have. Your blood. Your sweat. Your tears. You must repay the debt, no matter the consequences, so that what was stolen will be returned tenfold.

items.name: Firebomb
items.lore: Gunpowder is your favourite scent. It signals peace: the enemies have been blown to high hell. And who doesn't love peace?

items.name: Invariant
items.lore: It has witnessed the rise and fall of thousands of civilizations. It has observed the birth and death of millions of stars. It has seen universes open and close. It watches... as each second of eternity passes.

items.name: Lunacy
items.lore: The real power in madness comes not from some supernatural vigour, but from a sudden lack of interest in self-preservation, and the ensuing ability to do whatever you want.

items.name: Masterwork Fatal
items.lore: A mage by the name of Lero claims to have harnessed the sheer power of lightning using a magical staff, however, the weapon is very unreliable in a pinch.

items.name: Masterwork Idol
items.lore: Intricate carvings and images, almost like that of a totem pole, cover the shaft of this marvelous trident, dredged up from the Seavale Reef. Foreign magics heighten the senses of its user in battle, but also instills a longing for the ocean. Many have succumbed to this urge and drowned themselves.

items.name: Masterwork Nirvana
items.lore: Spiritual enlightenment is a goal that many monks hope to one day grasp the barest glimpse of, often thought to be a goal that must be worked towards over a lifetime. Holding this polished, translucent blade will instantly induce that lofty state until it is let go.

items.name: Nova
items.lore: There is a certain fascination to what lies beyond our grasp, to the spaces we cannot quite see. Harness that pull, draw in your foe, bend it to your will. What could go wrong?

items.name: Revolution
items.lore: A boiling rage has been gathering, the pain of an entire empire yearning to be freed. With all the power of the downtrodden and the overlooked and the starved, you echo out a shout with ten thousand voices, each too quiet to hear by itself, but together a catastrophic force to make the heavens cower.

items.name: Scrap Cannon
items.lore: The melody hardens, groaning and clanking, a clash of iron on steel and a shout from a thousand trampled mouths in unison. It burns and breaks, a roar of unbridled power.

items.name: Shamash
items.lore: A gentle, warm glow for the weak, and flames of condemnation for the wicked. Such is the doctrine you follow, and thus, the will you shall enact upon this earth.

items.name: Timeline Split
items.lore: You're seeing double. Perhaps that's because there's more than one reality there.

items.name: Abyssopelagic
items.lore: The depths bring stability, order, security. Those above are weak, unable to withstand the pressure. Those below are concerned with what lies further down. Leave your lawlessness, your chaos, your delusions of freedom. Open yourself to the abyss.

items.name: Allegiance
items.lore: There's an inscription written hastily lining the edge of the blade: "Before it is over, I will see you again... but I have been called. And I must answer."

items.name: Baleful Blizzard
items.lore: Whipping, chilling winds, and circling hailstones the size of boulders-the eye of your storm is the only safe place to be.

items.name: Beatdown
items.lore: It was a timeless duel, a clash of titans. Two soldiers so similar, so powerful, yet irrevocably at odds. But in the end, a bent link torn from a coat of mail stands testimony: she stood no chance, the warrior in discord with her own blade.

items.name: Charlatan
items.lore: Empty threats, thrilling bluffs, false promises: a little bravado goes a long way. Wielded properly, diction can be just as fatal as a knife to the heart, and it's much cleaner besides.

items.name: Gleam
items.lore: History measures empires; what are you, if not but a subtle flicker-masked within the brilliance of generations past?

items.name: Masterwork Lament
items.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.

items.name: Masterwork Stratiformis
items.lore: The Elves managed to harness the power of air itself, forming a bow made entirely of air currents, allowing the user to move swift like the wind, but vulnerable to attacks.

items.name: Rebel Ethos
items.lore: Stand up, fight back.

items.name: Riptide
items.lore: The waves are not like men; they do not brazenly assault and catastrophically fail. They do not burn fast and wink out. They bide their time, they wait, and they encroach upon the world with an insidious, unstoppable force, dragging you away to the dark side of the sea.

items.name: Whiplash
items.lore: The world is a blur around you. The swirls of colour interweave and blend to an amalgam of light in every direction. The worst thing you can do is stop.

items.name: Ahriman
items.lore: Your limbs fail you, and yet you still stand. Something, someone, has invaded your body, and it will use you until your last breath.

items.name: Apsara
items.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.

items.name: Architect
items.lore: Allies are exhausting, with their egos and beliefs, and pesky moral codes. Followers are much better-soldiers in your own perfect image, whose deaths are merely scaffolds to a world of your design.

items.name: Dissenter's Refuge
items.lore: Join the fight.

items.name: Fidelius
items.lore: You have seen the worst the world has to offer, and met it with a cold, determined gaze. You kill for those who cannot defend themselves. The battle is everlasting, but you are a durable soldier. Push through; for honour, for glory, for truth.

items.name: Inebriation
items.lore: A curious prototype from the labs of Sock Brewing, simply looking at this liquored effigy begins to induce vertigo, tipsiness, and then shortly afterward the ever-familiar mania which only drink can inspire.

items.name: Jamais Vu
items.lore: You do not recognize this place. A labyrinth of foreign walls closes in on you. Paths you have walked a thousand times now alien. Are these your hands? They are made of unfamiliar flesh.

items.name: Masterwork Guardian
items.lore: A vow of protection hangs over this spear, now inhabited by the spirit of a legendary heroine. Even simply a glimpse of the burning blade will instill a feeling of protection and security, and that feeling will hold true if one is brave enough to wield it.

items.name: Masterwork Olympic
items.lore: When one has climbed the highest mountain, traversed the vastest plain, what is left to conquer? One challenges the human limit, and attempts to push beyond what any has accomplished before. Sculpted in honor of the first champion, this idol emboldens you to best your greatest opponent: yourself.

items.name: Renegade Bomber
items.lore: "Skin worked so thin, we see the bone; she grinds us up from on her throne. Their houses made of flimsy steel; scars from bombs will never heal."

items.name: Stygian Spiral
items.lore: Do you ... really expect to be able to steal, or even touch, a single drop from that holiest-and cruelest-of springs?

items.name: Crown of Vicious Leaves
items.lore: The leaves in this coronet cackle and hiss, a cacophony of malicious intent. They would just as soon shred your enemies to bits as remove your own head from your shoulders.

items.name: Ego
items.lore: Sever every last impurity of the self, and bring to fruition a brilliant culmination of 'you'.

items.name: Fate
items.lore: A brilliant waltz on the razor's edge. Dance, dance through the fields of broken bodies and the vacant cities of empty people. Become the inevitable; the hands of time announce your interminable arrival. Raise your symphony to a crescendo, now: you are the dealer, and fate is the deck. The whole world will know your song.

items.name: Impatience
items.lore: "Doing it right" is a waste of time.

items.name: Libertas
items.lore: Break free. Free from the constraints of the flesh, free from the constraints of the mind, free from the constraints of the self.

items.name: Lustrum
items.lore: Your soul is stained. Covered in the dirt of deceit and the muck of murder, the sins haunt your every step. Burn it all away, purify your existence in a flash of brilliant light.

items.name: Pollution
items.lore: Wielding this molten sword, you feel your worries and empathy combust away into corrosive smoke. If one can feel so free, why should it matter if it comes to the detriment of the world around you?

items.name: Substrate
items.lore: Deep, deep below the swirling, suffocating muck and the things that slither and crawl in the dark, there is a pulse. A wild, churning, erratic pulse, beating ever so quickly to the tempo of the earth, waiting to be unleashed.

items.name: Tug of Fate
items.lore: The hands of destiny tighten and slacken without remorse, pulling hearts together only to push them apart in a relentless dance.

items.name: Ashfall Amulet
items.lore: The jewel attached to this pendant glows blood red from the heat contained within, replicating a throbbing, volcanic heartbeat. One's soul is rejuvenated from the embers of your enemies caught in the burning ash of each pulse.

items.name: Bellicosity
items.lore: A deep rage settles upon you. An unquenchable fury at the world around you, and all its wretched failings.

items.name: Degenerator
items.lore: This artefact begins deteriorating your flesh from the moment it touches your skin, but its destructive force can be channeled to rot the bodies of any who come near.

items.name: Incorporeal
items.lore: Holding this staff, you feel less . . . physical. Less real. The wind blows through you, blows past you, as though this world wasn't meant for you at all.

items.name: Lucky Strike
items.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.

items.name: Petal Blade
items.lore: The song of the world begins as a quiet whistle, calm and peaceful, wrapping 'round the trees and drifting lazily across the fields. It is ever so soft, yet sharper than any sword.

items.name: Steadfast
items.lore: Ground yourself. Your heart beats to the rhythm of the earth. With the weight of the world supporting you, nothing can break your stride.

items.name: Symphonie Fantastique
items.lore: The most poignant anthems are the toils of a tortured soul, a haunting, heart-wrenching melody from which one can never turn away.

items.name: Tautology
items.lore: It is what it is.

items.name: Vigilance
items.lore: Stackpeak hawks are known for their aggression towards adventurers approching their nests. However, under the hawks' hostility lies the instincts to protect the younglings from invaders.

items.name: Accelerando
items.lore: Not quite my tempo.

items.name: Brambleburner
items.lore: Beauty and fragility go hand in hand. As nature's blossoms and branches are delightful, so are they delicate. A single spark can set the whole world into glorious blaze.

items.name: Demonomicon
items.lore: A dusty old tome, containing all the powers of the abyss. From its pages spring forth the blackest of secrets and the darkest of truths. Do not let yourself slip into its grasp, for it will consume you too.

items.name: Machinations
items.lore: You'll connive, coerce, lure them in and control it all. Until all cards are set, all pieces in place. Then, when they've all exhausted their usefulness...

items.name: Skeetwing Jewel
items.lore: Buzzing betwixt the muck and mire.

items.name: Tactician
items.lore: This spear comes alive in your hands. It whispers strategy and technique to you, a voice that cuts through the clash of metal and screams of the dying. It is always correct. It has only ever lost a single battle. Do not let it down.

items.name: Adherence
items.lore: Adherence to the laws of good is important- it's why one fights the spread of corruption, after all. Though whether to follow the spirit or the letter... perhaps they too can be bent to your will.

items.name: Aleph Null
items.lore: It's a strange feeling, running forever to reach the horizon knowing another lies just as far past.

items.name: Breakthrough
items.lore: An anomaly of destruction, for the conquerors who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Continuum
items.lore: From nothing to everything, forever past to forever more, the vastness of eternity is obscured by the sameness of tomorrow.

items.name: Detachment
items.lore: An anomaly of separation, for the wanderers who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Divergence
items.lore: Strangers held together by shared past, entwined in a fray, never to unite again.

items.name: Exhibition
items.lore: An anomaly of adoption, for the caretakers who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Forbearance
items.lore: An anomaly of restriction, for the protectors who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Fractal
items.lore: Curious, isn't it, that unending complexity can feel so plain in one's hand, yet pull deeper than eyes can see and minds can fathom?

items.displayName: Inconceivably Deranged Paper Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Inconceivably Deranged Paper Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This cheap paper mask drawn in the likeness of Herbert von Legendary as he was having a complete nervous breakdown after having his life threatened by people who would not stop challenging him, is handed over in the ill-conceived hope of easing the murderous tendencies of those who have spent unnecessary amounts of time, broken the mold, gone even further beyond, pushed onward to prove that they will not stop, ultimately garnered an unhealthy obsession, and then came to blows in Doctor Legendary's house demanding further prizes all for the singularly unsettling and quite possibly sociopathic purpose of spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge. The inside has the names and addresses of multiple notable psychoanalysts written with a hastily-scrawled note from Doctor Legendary himself begging that you stop completing the Legendary Challenge and go get therapy before you do something to him that would constitute legal action against you.

items.name: Infinitesimal
items.lore: For when one needs to carve the smallest stone or pick the smallest lock, the subtleties of precision approach impossibility.

items.name: Ingress
items.lore: An anomaly of invasion, for the explorers who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Nonexistence
items.lore: What lies beneath the brim of all that never was, that overflowing vastness which cannot spill?

items.name: Recursion
items.lore: To call an end a new beginning implies there ever was a beginning, or ever will be an end.

items.name: Simulacrum
items.lore: An anomaly of replication, for the assemblers who seek purpose outside of reality.

items.name: Skyline Bliss
items.lore: The sky knows no bounds.

items.name: Thought Energy
items.lore: Limitless light fills the vast expanse of your mind.  Harness even a fraction of its potential, and you can command a force to shake worlds.

items.name: Albatross
items.lore: And lo, a single bolt did fly, ensured the bird's grace ever lost, and pierced its wings out from the sky, the day you shot the albatross.

items.name: Convergence
items.lore: As the void approaches nearer and nearer, the barrier between realms thins almost to a point... And yet, no matter how far you fall or how fast you fly, it will always lie just out of reach. Such is the indeterminate nature of the void, and its power that you harness.

items.name: Labyrinth
items.lore: Left. Right. Left. Right. They are desperate for an escape, merely playthings in a maze of your design. Left. Left. Right.  Turn back. When mountains of stone can shift at your command, their world is reduced to a single path. Left. Right. Does it ever end?

items.name: Martingale
items.lore: Every power has its costs, and every triumph has its toll. Wager everything you treasure-it will all be worth in the end.

items.name: Mesmerizing Madness
items.lore: Sink into infinite synchronous beats with the intricate rhythm of fractals and spirals and patterns, and patterns, and patterns that reach to the pulsating stars and then back to the ground where the people are dancing to songs they don't know under stars that turn ‘round, and around, and around, as the spiral is starting again . . .

items.displayName: Outlandish Replica Face Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Outlandish Replica Face Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This perfect-to-the-point-of-indistinguishability replica mask of Herbert von Legendary's face, painstakingly crafted by Corkus's most powerful machines with only the most expensive materials and featuring real moustache hair plucked from Doctor Legendary's face, is desperately handed over to attempt to placate those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, pushed onward to prove that they will not stop spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then ultimately garnered an unhealthy obsession for spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Platonic Ideal
items.lore: The intersection of what can be and what is. The apotheosis of being. Shear away the unclean, the impure, the rotten; leave only the raw, blinding truth of the self.

items.name: Resonance
items.lore: The power to join oneself with the lifeblood of the earth has long eluded sects of fanatical druids and shamans. One such cult found a way, and subsequently wiped itself out in the process, their flesh turning to stone and veins forming new rivers.

items.name: Taciturn
items.lore: The Expanse holds an exigent paranoia, a hamartia for even the most renowned heroes. Only a survivor knows to hoard intelligence, showing their hand only when none will be left to recount it.

items.name: Trance
items.lore: Down. Your enemies will fall slack. Deeper. Do you know this compulsion you bring? Deeper still. This implement, reaching from within and without. Even deeper. Souls and wills to command at the flex of a finger. Almost gone. It is my compulsion, too great to ignore. It is my implement, too strong to resist. My puppets, too deep to escape. Drop.

items.name: Transplanted Psyche
items.lore: There's a new voice in your head. An echo, a scratch at the back of your brain, bursting with all the memories of a life you've never led and the desires of a will you do not hold and the fears of a mind that is not yours. Won't you let it out? After all, two hearts beat stronger than one.

items.name: Umami
items.lore: Rumors circulate of a once-cook from Lutho who managed to achieve the perfect meal. In their final days, they preserved its essence in this necklace, in a hope that someone else would be able to share the experience they had.

items.name: Verglas Spirit
items.lore: "A little belief, and just a little spirit, can go a long way."

items.name: Xenolith
items.lore: Hidden amongst the foundations of the Expanse are anomalous fragments wrapped in an otherworldly power. While unsettling to the touch, the strength they impart is too tempting to ignore.

items.name: Abhorrence
items.lore: The last of her crimes was against herself. She reviled and hated, shattering any glass in which she might see her own cruel visage.

items.name: Animosity
items.lore: Let its whispers guide your hand, and let nothing but a scar of resentment remain.

items.name: Astral Grief
items.lore: The parting gift of a condemned lover: a mesh of starstuff, bound with hope. A reminder that the heavens will always guide you home. A forgiveness. This parcel never reached its destination.

items.name: Bloodbath
items.lore: Blood. Carnage. Death. Destruction. This is all Annihilation knows. A fury written into its very core, a violent rage building from an endless War. If it were to have its way, all of Wynn would fall to chaos.

items.name: Brutality
items.lore: Her crimes were against Man. She killed and broke, leaving lifeless bodies piled in her wake, and snuffing lives with horrific indifference.

items.name: Cnidarian Hellspawn
items.lore: A million stinging needles, tangled around your head; A crown of thorns; A wreath of nematocysts; A chaplet of venom and pain. From that poison cup, you drink and drink, until-Like a jellyfish-Only the currents decide your way. Until only an addictive Hate compels you.

items.name: Death Grasp
items.lore: Unspeakable things live within the shadows; waiting so patiently to take others into their ranks. Facsimiles of their existence, painted in inscrutable darkness. Nobody will see. Nobody will know. Nobody will remember.

items.name: Malevolent Urge
items.lore: You wouldn't even think of committing these atrocities, would you? But what if you weren't the one in control?

items.name: Myopia
items.lore: In such a sinister and wicked expanse, one wonders if the best solution is to give up your eyes and replace them with a pair that does not indulge in such evils, cleansing them from your idyllic field of view while the wider world around you withers away.

items.name: Petulance
items.lore: Her crimes were against Decency. She laughed and spat, denying reason and making the world suffer for small vengeance.

items.name: Phantasmal Hostage
items.lore: A soul sacrificed willingly, to an eternity in captivity. Imprints and memories; all that remain of a hero of the lands.

items.name: Possession
items.lore: Your mind is falling apart, the pieces scattering, your grasp on reality weakening, your soul an empty space. I shall fill it.

items.name: Quetzalcoatl
items.lore: The great serpent of Ahms was said to be a bringer of wisdom in days long past, revered by the inhabitants of the region. Totems like this one were crafted as an act of worship, though as belief faded over time, so too were these idols lost and destroyed. Only one remains.

items.name: Renegade
items.lore: Her crimes were against the State. She burned and pillaged, making a mockery of law and civility throughout the land.

items.name: Sacrilege
items.lore: The first of her crimes was against the Church. She blasphemed and raved, cursing with the names of gods long-abandoned.

items.name: Schadenfreude
items.lore: It's a wicked dream come true-their purpose is pain, both others' and their own; their will is naught but your command.

items.name: Sulfur Expulser
items.lore: Its frame is as that of a horrid maw, its arrows hideous tongues of stone. They reach out, pulling their victims into an acidic embrace. What are they searching, grasping for? Perhaps some questions are wiser to ignore.

items.name: Swindler's Charm
items.lore: This relic has been passed down through the ages, from conman to charlatan to chiseller. It grants an inexplicable sense of candor to your words.

items.displayName: Treasured Diamond Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Treasured Diamond Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This excessively ornate to-the-point-of-being-wasteful decorative mask, laser-cut from a meter's worth of pure diamond, is given to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then pushed onward to prove that they will not stop spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Wanderlust
items.lore: Are your heart, soul, and mind one? The ones who love are the most vulnerable. The ones who persist are the most detached. The ones who forget are the most naive. Only when you remove these impurities from your body could you reach the end.

items.name: Consolidate
items.lore: An attempt to contain dark within light, to strike back at brutality with compassion.  Reality protested. Bring together two forces, and all you have is discord.

items.name: Epoch
items.lore: This ornate bow holds a sinister beauty. Each rediscovery marks impending disaster, against any force that attempts to overcome it. Such is the inevitability of fate: irreverent to the will of masses, an epoch starts anew.

items.name: Flagellant
items.lore: An attempt to penetrate the depths of the abyss; a sacrifice made to a futile end. No avail. Bloodshed paved the way for bloodshed, and evil still operates while blind.

items.name: Fragile Truce
items.lore: The enemy of your enemy is your friend. It's naught but a ceasefire of convenience, if not necessity, yet it's a chance to lick your wounds and focus your might against the threat at hand.

items.name: Hanafubuki
items.lore: The most dangerous enemy is one you cannot see. Hidden amidst a flurry of petals comes an avalanche of blows, in one moment dissolving mountains and forests into a growing amalgam, leaving a wake of vibrant bloom in the next.

items.name: Hypoxia
items.lore: You need to keep moving. You can't stop here. You can't. You can't breathe. You can't run. You're dying. You can't keep on. You can't. You can't.

items.name: Idealogue
items.lore: An attempt to bring power into the hands of one: wealth weaponized across a province to this end. A hero revolted. Crystals burned and plans were brought to dust.

items.name: Lost Seconds
items.lore: This ring is set with a beautiful, mesmerizing gem. You could look at it for hours. Hours and hours and hours.

items.name: Masterwork Apocalypse
items.lore: To forge a weapon such as this from the cursed lava of the portal basin requires dozens, for each smith would lose themselves to the force of corruption before it is finished. The nightmarishly hooked blade serves no purpose but destruction, as intended.

items.name: Pareidolia
items.lore: Faces have danced around you as long as you can remember, laughing, jeering, mocking. This is your surrender, casting faces of your own into the theatre of your humiliation.

items.name: Surveillance
items.lore: An attempt to rule with an iron fist, a power hellbent on control and force.  Unknown. How far does the indomitable spirit of humanity extend?

items.displayName: Venerated Gold Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Venerated Gold Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This excessively ornate decorative mask, moulded from 24 carat gold, is awarded to those who have both spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge and broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge, and then gone even further beyond spending unnecessary amounts of time completing the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Viridian
items.lore: An attempt to discover opulence in stone; greed-fueled destruction and avaricious growth. Too far. Chaos was brought into the world, and greed begat death.

items.name: Withstand
items.lore: Despite the valley being overtaken by anomalous forces, the toughest flora has managed to avoid extinction. Their coiling vines and roots remind you that even in the most dire of situations, you will never go quietly.

items.name: Xenotransplantation
items.lore: Your flesh is but a weak imitation of power, a flabby welter of gushing blood and brittle bones, stitched together with threads of weak hope. There is only one way through: you must supplant your failing heart.

items.name: Black Space
items.lore: Give yourself to darkness, and in darkness, answers will take shape.

items.name: Immolation
items.lore: The act of self-immolation is never taken lightly, and is always a sacrifice. This idol was carved to honor one such instance, in which a master of flame burned through his life force in a final act of heroism-purging an encroaching army of the undead, saving the people of the jungle from destruction.

items.name: Impossibility Threshold
items.lore: Visions unknowable and faces unnamed. A violent cacophony with no end in sight. But beyond that- a clarity. A fleeting moment where the rules speak their names, just on the other side. You need to get closer. You need to be able to see.

items.name: Keratoconus
items.lore: The unearthly wood of eyestalk is durable, but with horrific cost. Pieces severed from the trunk continue to collect and cultivate the essence of abandoned eyes, and the unfortunate wearer becomes a catalyst for growth.

items.name: Oblivion
items.lore: This sacrificial kris, fallen from the peak of the Tower of Ascension, is completely hollow. To wield it is to invite to yourself the same hollowness. To become such an aberration, to unwrite yourself in pursuit of power...it must be fed of its wielder til only the barest existence remains.

items.name: Panic Zealot
items.lore: They must know what you went through. They must suffer the same as you did.

items.displayName: Revered Silver Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Revered Silver Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This ornate decorative mask, fashioned from pure silver, is awarded to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge and broken the mold by continuing to spend an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Abrasion
items.lore: "The fractures have ground the land to dust, our home to ruin, and our people to nothing."

items.name: Abyss-Imbued Leggings
items.lore: Steeped in the deepest energies of the Ahms region void, these ornately-crafted leggings are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Ambivalence
items.lore: "It's all doomed anyway. If you don't care, nothing can hurt you."

items.name: Anima-Infused Helmet
items.lore: Engraved with the beauty and mystery of the boreal lights, this ornately-crafted crown is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Antebellum
items.lore: Only the naive celebrate a ceasefire. Not a second wasted, a merciless arms race against the inevitability of war has left you ready to unleash hell the moment the armistice breaks.

items.name: Anya's Penumbra
items.lore: "The lightest light will never defeat the darkest dark. Only those who understand both can survive."

items.name: Boreal-Patterned Aegis
items.lore: Infused with the classical magicks of fire, water, and thunder, this ornately-crafted chestplate is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Cannonade
items.lore: An impenetrable fortress' greatest strength is psychological, a mythos built on the backs of a thousand attackers it has withstood. Your greatest strength is the belief that not one of those thousand could hold a candle to you.

items.name: Chaos-Woven Greaves
items.lore: With threads of fundamentally opposing magic delicately woven together, these ornately-crafted greaves are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Compliance
items.lore: "All of our faith, all of our worship, and we were rewarded with the apocalypse."

items.name: Contrast
items.lore: The runes carved onto the gold beads strung along this simple necklace translate into various words meaning variance. It provides many abilities though unexplainable means.

items.name: Dark Matter֎
items.lore: It permeates around you, so subtly, enveloping your very being with a shroud on the cusp of impalpability.  Nothing can affect you now - the incorporeal hiding in plain sight.

items.name: Dispersion
items.lore: "The lucky ones perished in the abyss. It's only a matter of time before the land picks us survivors off one by one."

items.name: Dondasch
items.lore: The sheer bond between Adamastor and Urdar has manifested itself into a physical form due to their duress. Such power is not to be abused...

items.name: Elysium-Engraved Aegis
items.lore: Dedicated to a place of courage revered by all warriors, this ornately-crafted chestplate is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.displayName: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory
items.name: Esteemed Bronze Mask of Legendary Victory
items.lore: This decorative mask, crafted of bronze alloys, is awarded only to those who have spent an unnecessary amount of time completing the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Etiolation
items.lore: Despite the absence of natural light, in the deepest reaches of the Void grows foliage and flora capable of sustaining itself by absorbing latent energy. Such an accomplishment is to be admired, ideally from a keen distance.

items.name: Gaea-Hewn Boots
items.lore: Forged in direct tribute to the earth and its aspects, these ornately-crafted boots are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Gravity
items.lore: No one knows how this extremely dense chestplate can even logically exist. It is almost paradoxical in nature, and affects its wearers in unfathomable ways.

items.name: Hephaestus-Forged Greaves
items.lore: Consecrated by Qira herself with blessings unknown to all but her, these ornately-crafted leggings are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Hephaestus-Forged Sabatons
items.lore: Honoring a mythical dwarven smith lost to the legends, these ornately-crafted boots are given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Infused Hive Bow
items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this bow has been infused with energy from all five known elements. Its string radiates a spectrum of colors.

items.name: Infused Hive Dagger
items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this dagger has been infused with energy from all five known elements. It leaves afterimages that pulsate in a spectrum of colors.

items.name: Infused Hive Relik
items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this relik has been infused with energy from all five known elements. The head gleams in a spectrum of colors.

items.name: Infused Hive Spear
items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this spear has been infused with energy from all five known elements. Its tip shimmers in a spectrum of colors.

items.name: Infused Hive Wand
items.lore: Deceptively plain-looking, this wand has been infused with energy from all five known elements. It subtly glows in a spectrum of colors.

items.name: Insignia
items.lore: To wear the mark is more than a show of allegiance. It is a willingness to channel the might of the gods at whatever cost, as the fate of the battle is worth more than surviving to see its end.

items.name: Intensity
items.lore: The runes carved into this simple gold ring translate into various words meaning power. It amplifies elemental energies in inexplicable ways.

items.name: Kalorite Jewel
items.lore: A symbol of apology. Of pain, never intended but given carelessly. Of good intentions marred by thoughtlessness and overeager optimism. To give one of these icy pearls away is to give away part of yourself,  and to give hope to those you have hurt that they may find peace.

items.name: Legendary Medallion
items.lore: This medallion marks its wearer as a true champion. It is awarded to those who have put an unnecessary amount of time into attempting the Legendary Challenge.

items.name: Marionette
items.lore: Aloft among the rafters of the crowded theatre a grin crept from ear to ear. Dim the lights. Tick. Raise the curtains. Tick. This shall be their final act. Tick.

items.name: Masterwork Aftershock
items.lore: The Fracturing brought Ahms into a shattered sky, sundering cliffs into an archipelago against the void. The tremors that linger carry an ancient power, bringing mountains to heel with ease and leaving devastation in its wake.

items.name: Mazeweaver
items.lore: The strong can hammer foe and nature alike into submission, waging war with indiscriminate force. The truly powerful pit them against each other on a whim, weaving stone and verdure into an elaborate web of attrition that beats with the heart of an entire world. What is an enemy compared to all the might of the Earth?

items.name: Obsidian-Framed Helmet
items.lore: Made of dark minerals and adorned with pure obsidian, this ornately-crafted helmet is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Obstinance
items.lore: "The protector will keep us safe even after this! It has to, it must, it-"

items.name: Pisces
items.lore: The oddly uncomfortable helmet was hand sculpted from a mystic clay found only in the depths of Molten Heights. Not much is known about the substance.

items.name: Planet Healer
items.lore: The jewels in this necklace naturally draw darkness and corruption into its wearer, purifying the land around them at the cost of their own life.

items.name: Prism
items.lore: The jewel on this ring is found very rarely deep beneath the Light Forest. It has the power to manipulate light itself.

items.name: Prowess
items.lore: The runes carved into this simple gold cuff translate into various words meaning mastery. It amplifies the ability of the wearer in mysterious ways.

items.name: Recalcitrance
items.lore: "The omens, the warnings, they were right there, and we stood by and did nothing."

items.name: Resolution
items.lore: In the moments before an all but inescapable death, time slows down, and the pace of battle becomes yours. By mastering the escape, you can face death on command, reaping the benefits at will before the reaper reaches you.

items.name: Succession
items.lore: "I pray that those who have heeded the wise one's warning have survived. The canyon must not meet this fate."

items.name: Syncope
items.lore: The soul of a Devil is so hot with hatred that their  bodies melt like candle wax, coming off in molten globs of flesh until only black bones remain.

items.name: The Evolved
items.lore: "How perfect can a form be? The creatures here are warped. Distorted. their flesh bubbles and oozes with the most toxic of acids. But it makes them powerful. Resilient. Perhaps it would be better to become one of them. Perhaps it would make your form . . . perfect."

items.name: The Exploited
items.lore: "They tear the earth open day after day after day, ripping out her most precious and vital stones, and dumping them into the abyss of their hungry, bottomless coffers. They would sell out the world for a bit of cash; after all, these stones bleed green."

items.name: The Forsaken
items.lore: "In the days before they ripped out its heart, there was a pulse to these streets: the sanguine flow of life through the sturdy buildings and cobbled roads and hidden alleys. What remains is a bloodless husk, dusty walls populated solely by those hideous things which can only see and never know."

items.name: The Watched
items.lore: "The feeling begins as a prickle on the neck. Is that tree staring? What does it see? How much does it know? This place is not right. It sees too much. It knows too much. The forest is staring at you. It burns the secrets out of you through its awful, unnatural retinas. There is nowhere to hide."

items.name: Titanomachia
items.lore: This is futile, a fight against odds so great you may as well challenge the force of fate itself. Yet there is pride to be found in delaying the inevitable, so stand your ground and fight to the end.

items.name: Twilight-Gilded Cloak
items.lore: An ephemeral moment in time captured by sheer force of magic, this ornately-crafted cloak is given only to those who have bested the Mistress of the Hive.

items.name: Windborne
items.lore: Orders, cannonfire, calls for surrender-the wind carries all. To ride the winds is to harness the lifeblood of battle, infiltrating up the veins of command with mere token resistance.

items.name: Black
items.lore: Hewn from the great obsidian spires surrounding the massive Nether gate, this fiercely-hooked dagger absorbs light and magic energy alike to create a desolate void wherever it is wielded.

items.name: Bonder
items.lore: It looks like they spelled the name wrong...

items.name: Braker
items.lore: Seems like the name is misspelled a little bit.

items.name: Capricorn
items.lore: During a spiritual journey to Kato temple, the sage Capian was presented with powerful spiritual boots with the intention to be used for peaceful magic, and not hard combat.

items.name: Cluster
items.lore: Perhaps one is weak. To be ignored. Perhaps two are not much better. But what of five? Ten? Twenty?...

items.name: Doomsday Omen
items.lore: Something is lurking-it must be, in the eerie silence that leaves you so utterly alone. And these remains... Are they a reminder of one who didn't stay quiet, or does what lurks in the unknown already know you're here?

items.name: Event Horizon
items.lore: When really does the point of no return come? Is it a gentle tug, whispers ushering you calmly to the other side? Is it a stark line, the point between light and dark, life and death? Perhaps you'll find out. Perhaps you already know.

items.name: Fatal
items.lore: A mage by the name of Lero claims to have harnessed the sheer power of lightning using a magical staff, however, the weapon is very unreliable in a pinch.

items.name: Frozen Devotion
items.lore: Crystalline towers and stark white horizons. The sharpest frost shards and the softest snowfall. Before the permafrost monarch of winter, lay your heart down: become the right hand of the cold.

items.name: Hearthkeeper
items.lore: Childhood memories, days of late nights and snow fights and cocoa by the fireside. Loving smiles and friendly faces. The beating heart of the world: home. This is what you fight for, beating back those dark and wicked forces which work to break down all that is loved. There is no sacrifice too great for the hearth.

items.name: Knucklebones
items.lore: An old Nemract saying is engraved along the metal. "A single toss of the knucklebones can make or break a gambling man."

items.name: Lower
items.lore: The name has got to be misspelled... It doesn't even make any sense!

items.name: Pandemonium
items.lore: Power, but at what cost?

items.name: Revenant
items.lore: Those whose souls are lost to the Canyon of the Lost eternally seek form. They inhabit those who wear these boots, unknowingly dragging the soul of the wearer into their ranks if worn for too long, leaving a wandering husk.

items.name: Singularity
items.lore: The existence of all things is reflected in the otherworldly jewels of this grand staff, dense enough to have its own gravitational pull. Users have reported their limbs being stretched after usage.

items.name: Sitis
items.lore: Wielding it for too long will leave one a desiccated husk, as this dull blade slowly absorbs all liquids around it.

items.name: Slider
items.lore: The spelling seems to have been botched.

items.name: Stinger
items.lore: If it weren't for that stray mark, this would be spelled correctly...

items.name: Stratiformis
items.lore: The Elves managed to harness the power of air itself, forming a bow made entirely of air currents, allowing the user to move swift like the wind, but vulnerable to attacks.

items.name: The Extinguished
items.lore: Everything that's fallen down here has a purpose. Or at least, it used to. Being too far removed from said purpose will eventually smother it, but it can always be rekindled... and that's where you come in.

items.name: Tidebinder
items.lore: This mysterious, half-liquid trident apparently holds the secret magics to control the ocean's ebb and flow. It is incapable of touching solid ground.

items.name: Titanium Grievers
items.lore: Crudely misshapen greaves made from haphazard scrap found about the Starfield. You sense a foreboding notion that donning such a thing would be the end of sensing anything at all.

items.name: Vaward
items.lore: A once-great hero left behind these sturdy, reliable greaves, trusting those after her to be able to use their power to protect others, should they don them. Her courage fuels their wearers.

items.name: Warp
items.lore: The notorious and erratic magical inventor Gawrick once attempted to make teleportation scrolls obsolete, by creating items which would allow the user to phase into an ethereal state to move unhindered. He did not account for the physical ramifications of this process, however.

items.name: Aphotic
items.lore: This dark relic was found at the very bottom of the deepest trench of the ocean. It drains all light surrounding it, blinding everything in a strange abyssal darkness.

items.name: Cancer
items.lore: 450 years ago a demonic plague like no other spread through Gavel, killing thousands. That is, until a priest encased the disease inside a helmet and warned everyone never to wear it.

items.name: Cascade
items.lore: A great magical cataclysm at Mage Island brought on by a strange, seemingly disconnected series of events resulted in this wand absorbing nearly uncontrollably high levels of magic.

items.name: Downfall
items.lore: A fallen link from a chainmail hauberk of an older time, this ring fell from a giant taller than a mountain. As it sped through the air and  gained momentum, it traveled so fast that it was battered to a tenth of its size.

items.name: Forlorn Pursuit
items.lore: A hovercraft scrounged from voidstone. Stained glass dulled to bleak grays. Blueprints and notes in indecipherable tongues. Moments, lost in time-like so  much refuse from the world above.

items.name: Hetusol
items.lore: The make of this massive cloak is unlike anything seen before among the provinces. Foreign images shift and melt in ethereal projections within the inside.

items.name: Masterwork Az
items.lore: Mysterious runes, held by inexplicable ancient guardians, were once moulded together for study purposes. The experiment went awry, as the runic words Nii, Az, and Ek were combined in a reaction that resulted in the collapse of a civilization.

items.name: Mephistophelian
items.lore: When the two opposing Realms come to blows, War lashes out with blind enmity. Such is the nature of a Devil, each born from the hate those two Beasts bear.

items.name: Monster
items.lore: This wand merges with the user on touch, bringing about horrific changes to them. Elongated nails, sharp teeth and the ability to breathe fire are trademarks of the beast.

items.name: Necklace of a Thousand Storms
items.lore: Sealed away by the Avos of the old days to prevent it from falling into the wrong hands, this necklace was enchanted to strengthen its wearers spiritual link to nature itself.

items.name: Petrichor
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Propeller Hat
items.lore: A tag on the inside of the hat reads: "Do not fly during thunderstorms! The wearer is liable for all injuries sustained while using this product."

items.name: Span of the Starfield
items.lore: Infinitesimal specks of matter wane in and out of view among the darkness of this clasp. Even a glance reminds you of what little exists in the expanses of the Void from which the materials of this were scavenged from.

items.name: Spring
items.lore: Arrows fired by this bow are pure ice, but when they hit the enemy, burst into magical water, flash-freezing all that it touches. The frost burns will never heal.

items.name: Stratosphere
items.lore: Forged from the storm-touched ether, this chest piece calls its wearer to rise above the sky. With every step, the pull of the earth weakens. Jump, and for a moment, you are weightless-caught between the clouds and the stars. Leap, and the heavens may answer.

items.name: Sweeping Majesty
items.lore: Echoes of the Fracturing persist in the Sky at scales unimaginable, implying a power so all-encompassing it leaves you in awe.

items.name: Sweet Memories
items.lore: The feel of cool cream. The savory satisfaction of fatty stew. The bittersweetness of chocolate. Luxuries long since lost alongside what once was, tastes and sensations you can't find anymore. It's enough to bring a man to bitter, bitter tears.

items.name: Warchief
items.lore: Sheer strength exudes from these Orcish relics, simple sandals ill-fitting to humans or Villagers. Enchanted with power and rage rather than magic, the strength that is provided when they are worn is unparalleled.

items.name: Absolution
items.lore: A deep regret stains this weapon-once a healing implement of the scholar-priest, its gentle power was turned and twisted as his ideals and resolve were tested, and faltered. With its wielder long passed, perhaps it can finally be absolved of the atrocities committed by his hand... and remember the peace it has long forgotten.

items.name: Air In A Can
items.lore: Contents under pressure.

items.name: Blank Stare
items.lore: In the marbling of wood grain. Drying moisture in the cobbles. Clumps of flowers. Tree bark, birth marks, the pattern of this plate - unflinching faces trapped, now revealed. The question pierces your mind: what shape will I be hewn into, one day?

items.name: Collapse
items.lore: Despite the light weight of the weapon, the spearhead has been made from incredibly dense cosmic stone. A strong enough impact can directly destroy matter. Due to this danger, it is sought after to be destroyed.

items.name: Cryoseism
items.lore: One of the first dwarven theories of the increasing quakes in east Gavel was that the freezing of a Dogun town in the Heights also froze a massive underground spring, disrupting the earth and chain-reacting across the province.

items.name: Divzer
items.lore: Unruly magics of void and darkness are tamed within this bow's string. While those energies are never to be released, arrows fired from it fire at such blinding speeds so as to phase out of existence when they hit their target.

items.name: Gaia
items.lore: The Dernel tribes revere various nature deities, each in their own unique fashions. One of the most notable was that of a lost tribe, who fashioned this blossoming stave as tribute to their deity of the earth itself.

items.name: Ghostly Quasar
items.lore: An eerie glimpse into what once was, shining beautifully in the infinite expanse of the Void. As tragic a tale it is, perhaps it is better left a wisp.

items.name: Grand Design
items.lore: It's a gravity as abstract as it is physical, of phenomena so fascinating one can't help but be pulled in.

items.name: Harwrol
items.lore: The runes carved onto the spear shift appearance so quickly as to be illegible, but those who wield it supposedly will learn their meaning.

items.name: Inferno
items.lore: The Dogun God Garaheth was actually an immense fire demon occupying the bowels of Molten Heights. Although unwise, the Dwarves forged a demonic dagger using his tooth in celebration of his slaughter.

items.name: Nirvana
items.lore: Spiritual enlightenment is a goal that many monks hope to one day grasp the barest glimpse of, often thought to be a goal that must be worked towards over a lifetime. Holding this polished, translucent blade will instantly induce that lofty state until it is let go.

items.name: Scorched Antiquity
items.lore: These hollowed spikes still hold the lingering embers of the event that formed this caldera long ago, lending an almost unnatural glow. It's a comforting warmth, though the force of the eruption remains dormant, primed for the slightest push.

items.name: Stardew
items.lore: Wybels have a strange attraction to cosmic magic, and many an owner will find them staring through the window at night. One, however, claims to have seen her Wybel making something out of white stardust. The abode was robbed shortly after, and the supposed item gone missing without confirmation of its existence.

items.name: Suspended Soliloquy
items.lore: No one can hold you down anymore.

items.name: The Incomprehensible
items.lore: After eons spent in parochial search for something familiar, perhaps this blade should have been a hint to think outside the box.

items.name: Virgo
items.lore: These common leather boots were once owned by a barbarian with no magical prowess. Instead of enchanting it, he coated the soles in corrupted shards to punish those who opposed him.

items.name: Cataclysm
