items.lore: Despite the existence of the Nether Portal, few believe that it is possible to open such rifts with sheer force alone. None believe that a tool with enough power to accomplish such a monumental feat could exist. And yet...

items.name: Cypress Amber
items.lore: "Discernable by its one-second glow, the cypress firefly makes it home amidst the ash of the upper heights, blending in with the fiery landscape." -Delinaed's Guide to Local Species, 2nd Edition.

items.name: Dawnbreak
items.lore: Many prophecies foretell of new eras. Most are fabricated or proven false in time. One passed through the Dogun caverns, however, tells of a dawn soon to break, in which the earth shall run red and return to flame. Fanatical sects whisper the coming of a new demonic god.

items.name: Ephemeris
items.lore: A pair of glowing sabatons crafted from time-lost relics. Somehow, despite just creating them, you get the feeling that you've worn these before...

items.name: Fantasia
items.lore: The confusion of sentience creates unknown and marvelous threads and soundscapes. Joy, grief, hate, love, shock, calm, they reflect back into the pattern and song of the universe. The glow of the Weave, and this brilliant, breathtaking, pale imitation of it, too, resounds in the chorus of existence-one extra layer.

items.name: Grimtrap
items.lore: Found at the site of the Caritat Mansion, a curse falls upon on all who don this glove; a decay of the body, to fester in their wounds, and a decay of the mind, to muddle all thought. With it, a notion takes hold: to suffer together is to suffer no more.

items.name: Hurricane Recurve
items.lore: The winds are a curious thing. The light breeze is calming, pleasant. The gale buffets and breaks things, as though it were a child's tantrum. Only the storm truly destroys, bearing its gusts against anyone or anything that would stand in its way, leaving behind only ruin and dust.

items.name: Ivory
items.lore: The holy blade of the House of Talor was crafted of pure unicorn horns, and consecrated by a hundred priests. Evil spirits are driven away by its mere presence.

items.name: Lament
items.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.

items.name: Lost Tales
items.lore: You can hardly notice some text engraved on this bracelet. Looking closer, the worn-out inscriptions are telling the legends of an ancient hero whom you do not know of.

items.name: Morrowind
items.lore: One of many lost artifacts from the legendary Wind Fortress, the engraving appears to be a cryptic clue to where the Fortress fell. "We shall be found among the dark winds of the morrow."

items.name: Perch of the Shrouded Sun
items.lore: Able to withstand the grasp of claws of pure steel, the perch of the Minokawa thrums with the might of a beast that can devour the sun. Given free reign of the skies, even the brightest of stars are no match.

items.name: Song of Solitude
items.lore: It is an apathy born from lonely desperation with which one sends a blinding ray as their signal flare, uncaring if it hails friend or foe.

items.name: Taurus
items.lore: The hide of the Touroto, an almost invincible Bull-like creature, is said to be pierced only by the horn of the Touroto itself, making it extremely valuable.

items.name: Thrundacrack
items.lore: The raw aspect of thunder, though claimed to be harnessed by a mage in a wand, has only been truly tamed by this mighty blade. Combined electric and life-draining magic intertwine and bring forth the truest, most frightening power of all Thunder.

items.name: Toxoplasmosis
items.lore: Can you feel the burning inside? Something has made itself at home. Time to tuck away the parts of you it has no need for, to shuffle your little brain around so you may Carry. Carry and Spread. Give it a new home-melting you down is how it says thank you. Be grateful, won't you?

items.name: Weathered
items.lore: A relic of the past in Time Valley was weathered down to a dagger by the sheer power of the wind. When used in battle, mysterious intertwined wind and time magic give it no physical presence.

items.name: Aquarius
items.lore: "The symbol of the river" is a name that is often synonymous with this garment, with many water like qualities surrounding it, heavily bathed in magical meaning.

items.name: Diamond Fiber Bracelet
items.lore: Desired by many of the countless challengers, this bracelet allows you to sense movements over thousands of meters away. It is decorated with rough yet beautiful jewels.

items.name: Diamond Fiber Necklace
items.lore: This ultimate version of a necklace was given to less than a handful of adventurers. Once on your neck, you can communicate with the ground below as if you grew roots.

items.name: Diamond Fiber Ring
items.lore: This masterpiece of a ring utilizes powerful electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Wearing it, you can feel a deep connection to the ground below.

items.name: Diamond Fusion Bracelet
items.lore: This bracelet opens up its wearers spirit, filling it with pure elemental knowledge. The ornaments decorating it are without peer.

items.name: Diamond Fusion Necklace
items.lore: Unlike any other invention this necklace enhances your power and understanding of the elements tenfold. The colorful jewels used are almost dizzying you.

items.name: Diamond Fusion Ring
items.lore: This mighty ring is the crown jewel amongst elemental rings. Wearing it, your knowledge is no longer limited to a few elements.

items.name: Diamond Hydro Bracelet
items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said, and no word was a lie. With this bracelet on your arm you could ride a wave with your bare feet.

items.name: Diamond Hydro Necklace
items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said and every word was true. With this necklace equipped, you could hear the ocean whisper.

items.name: Diamond Hydro Ring
items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant said, and no word was a lie. With this ring on your finger, you could catch a gnat without looking.

items.name: Diamond Solar Bracelet
items.lore: The device forged into this perfected bracelet drains all heat from its surroundings. Though it almost burns, you can feel your power growing

items.name: Diamond Solar Necklace
items.lore: The masterpiece of a necklace gathers all heat from its surrounding. It is fed to its wearer to maximize the strength of attacks.

items.name: Diamond Solar Ring
items.lore: The device forged into this flawless ring draws all heat from its surrounding. Though it almost burns, you can feel your abilites enhance.

items.name: Diamond Static Bracelet
items.lore: The heavy shocks coming from this perfected bracelet would be lethal under normal circumstances, but the only thing its wearer senses is the enhancement of power.

items.name: Diamond Static Necklace
items.lore: The lethal amount of electricity emmited from this often desired necklace fails to kill you, as its pure energy runs through your veins.

items.name: Diamond Static Ring
items.lore: The heavy electrical impulses coming from this ring would be lethal under normal circumstances, but the only thing its wearer senses is pure power. A true masterpiece of engineering.

items.name: Diamond Steam Bracelet
items.lore: This steam-powered bracelet is sought by many challengers of the Legendary Challenge. They say that they feel as if they're "one with the wind" when wearing it.

items.name: Diamond Steam Necklace
items.lore: This necklace is the pinnacle of steam-powered technology. Despite the size of the large jewel hanging from the necklace, it doesn't feel heavy at all.

items.name: Diamond Steam Ring
items.lore: Users of this perfect model of Legendary Island's steam-powered ring have reported feeling weightless in combat. The jewel of the ring is a perfectly clear diamond.

items.name: Eradian Cuissards
items.lore: Abandoned by the dwarven Ramriders in their heyday, this hefty armor forged to protect a steed sees little use but littering the steppes of the upper heights. A memento of a slaughter, in days long past.

items.name: Firebird
items.lore: From the ashes, let a hero rise anew.

items.name: Gale's Force
items.lore: Those who have used this near-weightless bow all seem to tell tales of how they see Gale's spirit fighting alongside them.

items.name: Gemini
items.lore: The gods of air and thunder, frustrated with being physically insubstantial alone, decided to band together to forge the ultimate leggings of defense.

items.name: Gold Fiber Bracelet
items.lore: This rough looking bracelet utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You can feel a rhythm with each step...

items.name: Gold Fiber Necklace
items.lore: This improved version of a bracelet utilizes rare electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You notice a rhythm with each step...

items.name: Gold Fiber Ring
items.lore: This improved ring utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. You can sense a rhythm with each step...

items.name: Gold Fusion Bracelet
items.lore: This bracelet, decorated with complex ornaments, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. Though powerful, there's still a lot to improve.

items.name: Gold Fusion Necklace
items.lore: This necklace, decorated with bright jewels, uses advanced nano-technology to boost its users elemental abilities. Though powerful, there are still a few flaws to be fixed.

items.name: Gold Fusion Ring
items.lore: This ring, covered in colorful artifical gems, seems to awaken a powerful elemental force in you. Though stronger than the previous model, its true potential stays sealed.

items.name: Gold Hydro Bracelet
items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?

items.name: Gold Hydro Necklace
items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?

items.name: Gold Hydro Ring
items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant insisted. Indeed, you begin to notice how your senses sharpen. But is that the limit...?

items.name: Gold Solar Bracelet
items.lore: The device forged into this improved bracelet seems to gather heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your arm...

items.name: Gold Solar Necklace
items.lore: The device forged into this advanced necklace seems to gather heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your neck...

items.name: Gold Solar Ring
items.lore: The device forged into this advanced ring seems to absorb heat. You can feel a warming sensation all over your hand...

items.name: Gold Static Bracelet
items.lore: The painful shock coming from this improved version of the ring is a small price for its power, but it has yet to reach its peak.

items.name: Gold Static Necklace
items.lore: The strong shock coming from this improved version of the necklace is a small price for its strength, but it has yet to reach its peak.

items.name: Gold Static Ring
items.lore: The strong shock coming from this advanced version of the ring is a small price for its power, but it has yet to reach its peak.

items.name: Gold Steam Bracelet
items.lore: This impressive bracelet is in high demand. Those who have obtained it say that they feel as if they're "one with the wind" when wearing it.

items.name: Gold Steam Necklace
items.lore: The jewel hanging from this necklace is said to be weightless. While still very powerful, its full potential has yet to be achieved.

items.name: Gold Steam Ring
items.lore: While this model of the Steam Ring is far superior to its predecessor, there still lies the capacity for one more upgrade. The jewel of the ring is crystal clear.

items.name: Grandmother
items.lore: The very first crossbow in existence was claimed to be utterly indestructible, but it is only true to a fault. The item cannot be broken, but solely because all damage to it is instead reflected onto the user. As its age is uncountably ancient, wielders will find themselves rapidly aging and withering away with even a mere touch.

items.name: Idol
items.lore: Intricate carvings and images, almost like that of a totem pole, cover the shaft of this marvelous trident, dredged up from the Seavale Reef. Foreign magics heighten the senses of its user in battle, but also instills a longing for the ocean. Many have succumbed to this urge and drowned themselves.

items.name: Ignis
items.lore: This bow, used by the dwarves to land the final blow in the slaughter of Garaheth, is extremely powerful. Special fire resistant gloves must be worn at all times to prevent burns to the user.

items.name: Ignition
items.lore: Forged with flaming scales shorn from Ozoth, the fabled Golden Ninja of the Canyon of the Lost hunted his prey relentlessly using this lightweight, yet harder than steel, polearm.

items.name: Minokawa's Grasp
items.lore: The sun fears its wings, and so shall your enemies.

items.name: Moontower
items.lore: For the belief of the cosmos' defilement, the moon was noted to remain unchanged. Those with this belief live only for the light of the moon, desperately seeking to maintain it through means that would only darken the soul of the most devout. Such from them comes the word lunacy.

items.name: Nether's Scar
items.lore: Forged directly from the bloody red stone mined from the Nether, they were locked away for fear of inciting insanity in those who wore them.

items.name: Nullification
items.lore: The diminutive stature of this item belies its abilities. Absorbing and expelling magical energy in precise bursts, it protects the user from all manner of attacks while punishing those who dare strike.

items.name: Pulse Storm
items.lore: In the shadow of the Sun, a storm of unmistakable hatred follows. One which, however ephemeral, may only yield to the great pyres like these in the minutes it has to spare.

items.name: Radiation
items.lore: Radioactive emissions caused by starfall seeps into the mind, the atoms, the Soul. Transfiguring organic matter into something new, something sinister. It's only through sheer force of will that victims of such a thing break free from themselves, and their imperfect vessels... into something beautiful.

items.name: Shawl of Gaea
items.lore: Despite being thin enough to blow away in the wind, this mineral-blended shawl holds the force of a supervolcano within its soft fabric.

items.name: Silver Fiber Bracelet
items.lore: This rough looking bracelet utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains a whispering.

items.name: Silver Fiber Necklace
items.lore: This crude looking necklace utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains quiet.

items.name: Silver Fiber Ring
items.lore: This crude looking ring utilizes electromagic to expose its wearer to earth's heartbeat. Though for now, it remains a whispering.

items.name: Silver Fusion Bracelet
items.lore: This bracelet, decorated with simple ornaments, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. There are many upgrades to be made before it reaches its full potential.

items.name: Silver Fusion Necklace
items.lore: This necklace, decorated with bright jewels, uses built-in micro-devices to boost its users elemental abilites. There are many upgrades to be made before it reaches its full potential.

items.name: Silver Fusion Ring
items.lore: This ring, covered in colorful artifical gems, seems to awaken a strong elemental affinity in you. With some improvements to its core, it could become even better...

items.name: Silver Hydro Bracelet
items.lore: You'll fight strong like the tide, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.

items.name: Silver Hydro Necklace
items.lore: You'll be wise like the sea, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.

items.name: Silver Hydro Ring
items.lore: You'll move quick like a river, the merchant said. Although you notice the built-in device's abilities, you feel space for an upgrade.

items.name: Silver Solar Bracelet
items.lore: The device forged into this simple bracelet seems to gather heat. You feel a bit lukewarm when wearing it...

items.name: Silver Solar Necklace
items.lore: The device forged into this basic necklace seems to gather heat. You can feel a warm sting when holding it.

items.name: Silver Solar Ring
items.lore: The device forged into this simple ring seems to absorb heat. You feel a bit lukewarm when wearing it...

items.name: Silver Static Bracelet
items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the simple, mechanical bracelet without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...

items.name: Silver Static Necklace
items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the plain, tech-enhanced necklace without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...

items.name: Silver Static Ring
items.lore: Though it's hard to touch the plain, mechanical ring without experiencing a little shock, its capabilities intrigue you...

items.name: Silver Steam Bracelet
items.lore: Users who have worn this early model of the Steam Bracelet have reported that they have felt "one with the wind" while wearing it.

items.name: Silver Steam Necklace
items.lore: Despite the size of the large jewel hanging from this necklace, it doesn't feel heavy at all. However, the necklace's mechanisms seem incomplete.

items.name: Silver Steam Ring
items.lore: This prototype model of the Steam Ring increases the user's agility in combat. The jewel of the ring is crystal clear.

items.name: Stargazing Lens
items.lore: A single vibrant star sits at the focus of the mirror. Though, faintly, many more sit in the perimeter of the view... perhaps they mean something?

items.name: Stellar
items.lore: Elementally attuned gemstones are melded together to form the singular marvel found on this pendant. Despite the violent smithing process, the jewel is utterly flawless.

items.name: Summa
items.lore: An auxiliary power core of the powerful TERA-4M Mining robot line. It controls the robots by giving the bearer a compulsion to break new grounds and progress further without heed.

items.name: Sunstar
items.lore: Once known as the Doomsday Weapon, it was ultimately never used for its intended purpose - its solar focus was cracked upon the day of its completion. All but a fraction of its energy was expelled, obliterating its creators, but overwhelming magical force still pulses and thrums through the web of fractures in its design.

items.name: Ten-Foot Pole
items.lore: I'm not touching this with a... well. Yeah.

items.name: Time Rift
items.lore: You only have limited time. But what if, you could experience that time again? And again, and again...

items.name: Trikaya
items.lore: Truth, bliss, emanation, guiding the path forward unto enlightenment.

items.name: Alkatraz
items.lore: Soul-locking magic is one outlawed by Gavellian governments, only used by the most insidious and cruel of mages. One such enchantment looms dormant in this mundane-looking maul. Continued usage of the weapon threatens to release it upon the wielder, permanently binding them to the weapon.

items.name: Dance Among the Stars
items.lore: Carelessly aloft, between the heavens and the abyss...

items.name: Greatbird Eyrie
items.lore: Sculpted by searing flames and dazzling light, in the years since the Fracturing the Greatbirds' nest has developed a blinding glow. It has both immense power and volatility, yet seems to hold a hidden strength for one who can tame its spirit.

items.name: Hadal
items.lore: Carved from unknown parts of a sea creature unseen, the goliath scales of this effigy of the deep bring forth...a pull. A weight, a pressure. A terrible, crushing depth brought onto the holder, blanketing them like nostalgia. Their owner watches, part of itself acutely aware of its missing pieces.

items.name: Masterwork Archangel
items.lore: The unwieldy, yet imposing stature of this massive sickle strikes awe into those who view it. Those who have the will to wield it, however, seem to garner respect from all those around them, as though they had become a god.

items.name: Phoenix Wing
items.lore: The magically rejuvenating properties of phoenix ash were imbued into this grand stave in its creator's bid to gain immortality.

items.name: Sagittarius
items.lore: The hide of the centaur is extraordinarily magical in the right hands. It is told to allow the user to gain the swiftness of the horse, but also leaves them vulnerable to hard hitting attacks.

items.name: Slayer
items.lore: Many artifacts are found to incite rage in the wearer, and wizards old and new alike conjecture as to the purpose of them. Very few increase the latent abilities of the wearers to ensure havoc, and none to such a degree as these boots.

items.name: Alka Cometflinger
items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and raw potential fuse to create an imposing presence, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for complete obliteration.

items.name: Boreal
items.lore: The last known crafts of Theorick before his fall in battle were pieces of armour crafted out of pure ice, all of which have melted save for these shimmering boots. The coldest gales and most suffocating heat nurture and repair the wearer instead of being stifling or deadly.

items.name: Esclavage
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Flameshot Hilt
items.lore: Found abandoned in the ruins of the Doguns, these odd weapons are designed to shoot jets of sheer flame instead of hitting enemies traditionally. They are in terrible disrepair, and none know how to fix them.

items.name: Freedom
items.lore: Freedom of soul, mind, and body are forced upon all those that this bow's arrows impact, and freedom of caring from the atrocities that such a dangerous weapon can inflict is given to all those that hold it.

items.name: Guardian
items.lore: A vow of protection hangs over this spear, now inhabited by the spirit of a legendary heroine. Even simply a glimpse of the burning blade will instill a feeling of protection and security, and that feeling will hold true if one is brave enough to wield it.

items.name: Leo
items.lore: This thick skinned jacket, imbued with the courage of a thousand lion hearts, will grant the user massive protection from all who target them.

items.name: Nepta Floodbringer
items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and immense wisdom meld to create a commanding aura, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for dominion over all.

items.name: Olympic
items.lore: When one has climbed the highest mountain, traversed the vastest plain, what is left to conquer? One challenges the human limit, and attempts to push beyond what any has accomplished before. Sculpted in honor of the first champion, this idol emboldens you to best your greatest opponent: yourself.

items.name: Pain Cycle
items.lore: Every ounce of your suffering must be made worth it. Otherwise, what was the point of it all?

items.name: Thrunda Ripsaw
items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and consuming fury combine to create a deadly aura, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for utter cataclysm.

items.name: Zephra Shredder
items.lore: Combined power of inscribed Uth runes and sheer rage intertwine to create a fearsome sight, as this weapon is merely a spiritual extension of the user's desire for total destruction.

items.name: Abiogenesis
items.lore: Life itself is not a flexible material to work with-building sentience is precisely like squeezing blood from a stone. It may be years of toil, but the strength of an entire race that looks to you as a creator cannot be overstated.

items.name: Aries
items.lore: Two iron horns adorn this helmet to enhance the warriors of the Eradian, Dwarves who specifically rode Rams into battle at incredible speed.

items.name: Axiom
items.lore: Let the land before you serve as the script for your words to write anew.

items.name: Bedruthan
items.lore: Stone shorn from mountains by the roiling sea gathered on the shores of Llevigar one day, washed onto the sand in the shape of a massive spear. It was taken as an omen, and the stones were forged into a true weapon.

items.name: Daredevil
items.lore: The mangled body found days too late apparently thought this necklace would let them traverse between geysers into the Upper Heights.

items.name: Galleon
items.lore: Forged with the raw powers of both the earth and the sea, these boots were initially an attempt at creating a method of foot-travel over the seas. Despite the spectacular failure of that application, they remain a formidable and reliable set of armor.

items.name: Hellstrand
items.lore: This profane bow was crafted by a Kander cabal in opposition to the House of Talor's holy relic. Holding it for too long will strain and warp the user's mind.

items.name: Memento
items.lore: All those who wear these enchanted boots deposit a single fond memory into them. They are forgotten forever, but wearing them recalls every memory within vividly.

items.name: Narcissist
items.lore: The world revolves around you, after all. It's high time you spread the news!

items.name: Protector's Parable
items.lore: A wolf and a rabbit met in the woods. The rabbit was injured; the wolf spared it. The two grew close. One day, the rabbit fell into a hunter's trap. It was terrified, surrounded by armed men. The wolf burst from the trees, fighting the men back, even as they shot it with their bows, long enough for the rabbit to run away. It never saw the wolf again.

items.name: Cardiac Arrest
items.lore: ...As the heart fails, adrenaline pumps through the body in an attempt to provide energy and keep the victim alive, but medical action must be taken to ensure survival. -Excerpt from Aldorei Medical Tomes, Vol. 6

items.name: Equinox Blossom
items.lore: Perennial, in a sense-these plants cycle through a unique bloom for every season. When they fully form, the breathtaking equinox is said to shine with an otherworldly light.

items.name: Hero
items.lore: Enigmatically, this weapon will only show itself to those who believe themselves to be worth nothing, or to be weak. While utilizing this weapon will greatly strengthen one's resolve, it will disappear when it is no longer needed, going to the next wielder.

items.name: Kaze
items.lore: Gentle spirits of the wind attract themselves to the brilliant jewels slotted into this ring, bringing peace to its wearers and those around them.

items.name: Libra
items.lore: Before the invention of magical weight detectors, there was a giant pair of public scales in Cinfras. Instead of being thrown away, they were reforged to be a formidable piece of armour.

items.name: Masterwork Pure
items.lore: Carved directly from the mysterious rock that hit Gavel 50 years ago, this pure white wand glows with cosmic energy unknown.

items.name: Resurgence
items.lore: An antique passed from the Caritat wreckage into the hands of the outcast elves of Efilim. So to honor the memory of the selfless family as inspired their self-imposed exile, their strongest healing spells were imbued into it, and sent to those who needed them most.

items.name: Shatterglass
items.lore: This small, rough-crafted pendant is the only known magic artifact of the Orcs. It incites destructive tendencies within the wearer.

items.name: Asphyxia
items.lore: A condition of severely deficient supply of oxygen to the body that arises from abnormal breathing; practitioners that abuse specific magic combos are often found incapacitated by said condition.

items.name: Bronze Basic Bracelet
items.lore: This bracelet is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.

items.name: Bronze Basic Necklace
items.lore: This necklace is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.

items.name: Bronze Basic Ring
items.lore: This ring is awarded to participants of the Legendary Challenge. Its modular design allows it to be upgraded in a number of different ways.

items.name: Crusade Sabatons
items.lore: One of the very few physically-powerful artifacts of the Villagers, these boots were used in the initial crusades against the Green-skins, to overpower the Orcs via raw physical might. Though effective, they have not seen use in a long time.

items.name: Follow The Wind
items.lore: A lost relic from the Wind Fortress, a mythical stronghold of the Sky Islands that fell into the Void long ago. A small mechanism within the bracelet points towards its place of origin.

items.name: Phoenix Prince's Crown
items.lore: The Phoenix Prince is a mythical figure spoken of in Avos legend. His crown cursed him in an endless cycle of death and rebirth.

items.name: Quilted Carapace
items.lore: This patchwork of shells from the Corkian Astrochelys makes for quite the statement sweater; it keeps your neck warm and besides, your foes' fashion fancies feel frivolous, anyway.

items.name: Return to Ether
items.lore: This enigmatic weapon can suddenly blink out of reality with no warning only to appear exactly where it was left later. Artificers have determined that almost the entire bow, by all known laws of nature and magic, should not exist.

items.name: Scorpio
items.lore: The carapace of the common Maexi pet fire scarabs, while alone, only cause minor burns to the touch. However, when woven together, they produce a variety of cumulative effects.

items.name: Sigil of Existence
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Starburst
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Untimely Demise
items.lore: "Death claims your soul..."

items.name: Alazarin
items.lore: This bloody palette knife was used to kill only two people before it was abandoned - a killer who broke into a great artist's home, and the artist who struck the blow.

items.name: Discoverer
items.lore: Wealth and riches...but at what cost?

items.name: Greaves of the Veneer
items.lore: Forged from mystic, previously unknown metals revealed in the deepest dwarven mining site to date, these sleek, glowing greaves are believed to be utterly indestructible.

items.name: Squall's Breath
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Auxetic Capacitor
items.lore: This pendant is not much more than a battery on a string, but a curious combination of Avos and electromagic seem to have left it with the ability to charge power from its surroundings on its own.

items.name: Herald of Ruin
items.lore: The calm before the storm is a time of preparation, of perseverance until clearer days. But this? This is the last moment of peace they will ever know.

items.name: Overdrive
items.lore: Holding this relik sends sparks through your veins, making your heart beat fast. And faster. And faster and faster and--

items.name: Third Eye
items.lore: The Bantisu monks have developed this enigmatic sigil in their years of meditation and study. It blesses the wearer with luck and powerful psionic ability.

items.name: Tisaun's Proof
items.lore: The wear upon this broken old battle spear does not affect its ability in battle. The souls of a thousand fallen warriors resound within it.

items.name: Abominator
items.lore: Who would have thought to ever design something as pointlessly contrived and unusable as this? It's infuriating just to think about...

items.name: Blossom Haze
items.lore: And as the spring bursts, the blossom petals flutter in the wind amongst the ashes of your enemies.

items.name: Cessation
items.lore: Nothing more.

items.name: Grillface
items.lore: The old facemasks of the Eradian guards were forged from raw magma, and enchanted to remain searingly hot, so as to brand the wearer eternally with the mark of Rodoroc's elite.

items.name: Lunar Spine
items.lore: From the Nether Gate, a shard of cosmic stone was ejected. Its purity was defiled, and the first man to wield it went mad, raving about the fall of the cosmos' beauty.

items.name: Tisaun's Valor
items.lore: Tisaun, a warrior tasked to fend off a corrupted siege alone, could find only a thin shirt and rusted spear to use before the attack. He defeated all 1000 enemies without taking a scratch, and his bravery infused his gear with that same strength.

items.name: Zero
items.lore: The unstable power within this bow is capable of great destruction, but seems to zero out at the most crucial moments in battle. Only the most skillful archers can wield this weapon with confidence.

items.name: Brass Brand
items.lore: Built by Cerid to accrue raw static charge from the surroundings and direct it at opponents, the blade's chief failing is that the wielder is not rendered immune to their own discharge as intended.

items.name: Faustian Contract
items.lore: Once a contract is formed, and before its details are discussed, a seal is placed on the human's body.

items.name: Outrage
items.lore: This battered stone mask is of unknown origin, and has no openings for the eyes whatsoever. Indeed, all that can be seen while wearing it is that which makes you truly angry.

items.name: Shredder Club
items.lore: There's a scrawling etched onto the handle: "UNGA BUNGA'S. NO TOUCH."

items.name: Steamjet Walkers
items.lore: A rogue inventor stole the plans for a steam jet booster from Corkus and reverse engineered them onto a set of boots. While effective, they are dangerous, prone to catastrophic failure.

items.name: Wanderer's Purpose
items.lore: To look and say "I will go there," and to keep going until you find it...that's what's important.

items.name: Albedo
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Found Footage
items.lore: Despite heavy damage, this memory core recovered from a fallen Despermech remains usable. Sifting through its contents paints a clear yet brutal picture of the destruction the rogue creations have caused.

items.name: Procrastination
items.lore: ...I'll finish writing this later.

items.name: Proxima
items.lore: This spear is bright enough that it can cause blindness if you look directly at it. Its immense power is limited by its weight; the weapon is nearly impossible to lift.

items.name: Runebound Chains
items.lore: You know better than anyone else that there's always a sliver of truth behind the tallest of tales.

items.name: Shattered Horizon
items.lore: What chaos is born when the sun won't rise, as it lacks a sky upon which to dawn?

items.name: Torrential Tide
items.lore: The tides of the ocean, once bound, became useful magic power sources. They were once utilized for weapons, but to harness the unstable force of the raging sea was considered too dangerous.

items.name: Booster Plate
items.lore: A marvel of Corkus' electromagical advancements, this high-tech chestplate is equipped with steam jets to boost the user's speed, at a minimal cost to protection.

items.name: Conflagrate
items.lore: Donning this helmet sears your mind with images of a world on fire. These blistering thoughts pressure you to make that world a reality.

items.name: Granitic Mettle
items.lore: Sometimes it takes a heart of stone to do what must be done.

items.name: Iosis
items.lore: The last step towards purity. Dissolve and coagulate. Be anew.

items.name: Rikter
items.lore: Named for an ancient Wynnic word for "Earthquake", this mighty battle hammer causes the very bones of struck enemies to rattle and heave as though the earth itself was splitting under their feet.

items.name: Valse Vaincue
items.lore: The Wanderer; the Betrayer; the Lunatic.

items.name: Aersectra
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Black Catalyst
items.lore: Even simply looking at these odd rings gives way to a compulsion to wear two of them, despite all better judgement.

items.name: Gadgeteer
items.lore: This suit was clearly designed by the hand of a mechanic, though its purpose is unknown. There are quite a lot of buttons on it though, so let's press this one!

items.name: Jiandan Handwraps
items.lore: The cloth wraps produced by the canyon Dojo are just that, merely soft cloth. It is left to the users to apply them skillfully in battle, in whatever way they see fit.

items.name: Bismuthinite
items.lore: An extremely rare metallic ore only found within the island region of Corkus, it is normally used in decorative dyes. However, a mishap one day caused the discovery of strange and cumulative effects when exposed to traditional magicks.

items.name: Dark Shroud
items.lore: Wearing this deceptively simple shroud causes the user to fade into the shadows, sometimes flickering out of existence for a moment.

items.name: Old Keeper's Ring
items.lore: Found on the corpse of the oldest shopkeeper of the Gavel province, the engraved text reads 'GREED'.

items.name: Apocalypse
items.lore: To forge a weapon such as this from the cursed lava of the portal basin requires dozens, for each smith would lose themselves to the force of corruption before it is finished. The nightmarishly hooked blade serves no purpose but destruction, as intended.

items.name: Fenmask
items.lore: This matted tangle of vines and marshland plants contains various herbal remedies woven into it. It is oddly comfortable, despite the thorns coating the inside.

items.name: Pas De Deux
items.lore: "I am only human in the snow. When it melts away, so too do I, for then I am cursed to be a swan."

items.name: Spiritshock
items.lore: Recovered from the Lexdale Penitentiary, this grisly bow holds destructive capabilities. Used to carry out executions, a precise enough shot can shatter the soul of those it hits.

items.name: Adder Stone
items.lore: Aldorei charms are often shared and tinkered with by gifted Elves within the commune. Though simple, the stones blessed by elven magic provide soothing energy to the wearer.

items.name: Air Sanctuary
items.lore: The expanse of the skies, where the wind whistles a warbling anthem and the air extends onward forever.

items.name: Altum Spatium
items.lore: Even looking at this pendant strains your eyes. Should it even exist?

items.name: Athanasia
items.lore: May your triumphs live eternal and never fade.

items.name: Cacophony
items.lore: Let their souls sing your chorus of victory.

items.name: Earth Sanctuary
items.lore: The heart of the earth, where the ground blooms beautiful blossoms and life grows untethered.

items.name: Eleventh Hour
items.lore: The last stand, a hero's rally, a turning tide-is it a tale of a champion who conquered, or a martyr who inspired? This is your story to tell.

items.name: Fire Sanctuary
items.lore: The house of the flames, where the sky runs red with rage and passion burns through every soul.

items.name: Gale's Sight
items.lore: True to their promise, these goggles were left as a memento for Ohms when his lover Gale finally died. Light as air, Gale's carefree nature lends itself to those who don them.

items.name: Gert Super Special Magic Ultistick
items.lore: Well...it is a very pretty-looking stick, but aside from that it just appears to be a plain old stick.

items.name: Metamorphosis
items.lore: What you have seen will mark you forever.

items.name: Provenance
items.lore: Your success heralds the beginning of something new.

items.name: Rainbow Sanctuary
items.lore: The harmony of the elements, a world which sings its truth for all who dare listen, words spoken which can be felt but never known. The Sanctuary, in its whole.

items.name: Reckoning
items.lore: Come to terms with your godlike judgment.

items.name: Rewind
items.lore: Time moves in strange ways around this translucent blade, speeding and slowing, starting and stopping, with no observable reasoning or pattern.

items.name: Thunder Sanctuary
items.lore: The home of the storms, where the cramped clouds crackle and power surges in sharp bolts.

items.name: Traumerei
items.lore: In sleep we are unfettered, unhindered by the choices we make. In dream we are unbound, set free to the limits of imagination.

items.name: Veneration
items.lore: Revel in the respect you've finally earned.

items.name: Ventus Tail
items.lore: Fashioned from the cut tails of the now extinct Venti, these nearly immaterial boots are light as air and crackle with lightning.

items.name: Water Sanctuary
items.lore: The depths of the seas, where the waves flow fierce and fast and wash away the agonies of the world.

items.name: Welder Cannon
items.lore: Warning - device in state of extreme disrepair. Operators may experience unstable output, resulting in severe heat production upsurges. Any damage to material will not be reimbursed, and users will not be compensated for any injuries, burns, or deaths caused by improper use.

items.name: Double Vision
items.quest: Realm of Light V - The Realm of Light

items.name: Empire Builder
items.lore: This golden staff was recovered from deep within the tombs of Almuj. Nothing else was found in the room except the words 'Beware the user with unlimited imagination.'

items.name: Momentum
items.lore: This golden cuff has an odd time dilation effect surrounding it, slowing all movements significantly, but multiplying the force of impact to a significant degree.

items.name: Pristine Antiquity
items.lore: Smooth yet unassuming, this hollowed piece feels as if it lay untouched for millennia as the chaos that formed eastern Gavel unfolded around it. No blemish nor order, just nature preserved in its most perfect form.

items.name: Tenuto
items.lore: This strange pendant has been known to dilate time around the wearer, slowing their movements while greatly augmenting their power.

items.name: Blade of Purity
items.lore: The creator of this polished white blade insists that its true power will never be unlocked, for only those who are not influenced by the elements of the world know truly how to utilize it.

items.name: Conspirator's Trickpockets
items.lore: No reign lasts forever. Not while your schemes remain unnoticed.

items.name: Gospel
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Aftershock
items.lore: The Fracturing brought Ahms into a shattered sky, sundering cliffs into an archipelago against the void. The tremors that linger carry an ancient power, bringing mountains to heel with ease and leaving devastation in its wake.

items.name: Andesite Aegis
items.lore: Andesite is a stone commonly used for weapons and construction, but tends to be ineffective as armor when impure. This sturdy chestplate, however, is testament to the strength of pure andesite.

items.name: Bright Edge
items.lore: A blade of pure light forms in your hands. It moves of its own accord, a blinding radiance dancing through your enemies, using you as a vessel for its brilliance.

items.name: Heracul
items.lore: Reconstructed from mere wooden scraps of its former self, this extremely heavy crossbow still contains immense power. It was intended for use with a lost suit of armor, of which only one piece remains.

items.name: Inquisitor's Zeal
items.lore: They have pillaged your faithful houses and razed your sacred fields. Imbued within this lance is an aspect of holy power, and with it you will bring Hell itself up to meet these vile transgressors.

items.name: Martyr
items.lore: A recently married man went off to war wearing this wedding ring. Though he perished in battle, his courage and determination empowers all who wear it.

items.name: Obsolescent Panoply
items.lore: A silhouette of forgotten strength, its essence lingering like a half remembered dream. It no longer boasts the sharpness it once had, yet the stories etched into its very being refuse to fade.

items.name: Tachypsychia
items.lore: You will probably irreversibly harm yourself with this, but when has that ever stopped you?

items.name: Twin Minds
items.lore: It takes two voices to make harmony.

items.name: Post-Ultima
items.lore: These leggings are the last remaining piece of a historical set of armor, created with such power as to be thought impossible long ago.

items.name: Prymari
items.lore: This staff was expertly crafted from fragile spun glass, and tinted with various magical foci that bend light into its most raw components.

items.name: Arma Gauntlet
items.lore: Stories say that should anyone wield both of these fearsome gauntlets in battle, they will become unkillable in a fight. The second gauntlet, however, has never been found.

items.name: Babel
items.lore: All legends must one day fall, but their legacy shall be remembered forevermore.  These memories exist in the hearts of all,  and pave the path forward in hopes to create a world where all may find peace,  however rocky that path may be.

items.name: Cold Wave
items.lore: Feeling the fresh chill of the cold air is all you need to know you're really alive.

items.name: Royal Blazing Amulet
items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It glows with a comforting warmth.

items.name: Royal Cyclone Amulet
items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It whistles with an invigorating tune.

items.name: Royal Dusty Amulet
items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It shines with a powerful strength.

items.name: Royal Shocking Amulet
items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It crackles with a chaotic energy.

items.name: Royal Stormy Amulet
items.lore: An exclusive amulet given to the most honored knights of Wynn. It pulsates with a calming aura.

items.name: Az
items.lore: Mysterious runes, held by inexplicable ancient guardians, were once moulded together for study purposes. The experiment went awry, as the runic words Nii, Az, and Ek were combined in a reaction that resulted in the collapse of a civilization.

items.name: Puppeteer
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Soul Ink
items.lore: Taken from the Archwraith by a pious Shaman, this chestplate was immediately abandoned. Its few users since have turned to an all-consuming desire to seek out and realign the last vestiges of purity remaining in the Kander Forest.

items.name: The Forgery
items.lore: While only a mockery of the original product, this line of helmets became wildly popular before legal disputes and safety concerns halted production.

items.name: Warden
items.lore: "I've been wishin' I was dead for a long time."

items.name: Disfigured Vessel
items.lore: An imperfect fit, but you can make a better one.

items.name: Ensa's Faith
items.lore: The scholar-priest Ensa created this pendant as a personal prayer while his home was under siege. It is rumored to hold the key to enlightenment, but it is unknown as to how.

items.name: Infernal Impulse
items.lore: If the depths of hell allows you this, is staying human an equal trade or a fool's choice?

items.name: Passus Lux
items.lore: A brilliant relic supposedly originating from the Realm of Light, the creators of these strangely shaped boots are completely unknown.

items.name: Reliquiae
items.lore: Ancient and new hearts beat as one.

items.name: The Siren's Call
items.lore: "I have hope in me the likes of which you could never imagine, and despair the likes of which you shall never fathom. If I cannot satisfy the one, then I will indulge the other."

items.name: Abyssal Amulet
items.lore: Used by the Order of the Abyss to aid their summoning rituals, it contains a strange, fiery energy. It has ties with a terrible demon...

items.name: Marvel
items.lore: The stellar quality of the coral jewels set into the ring comes from a magical purification process, involving a decade-long soak in mystical Gylia water.

items.name: Tenacity
items.lore: The strength to keep going, to push on in the face of adversity. It's a rare kind of grit, the one that takes hold and won't let go until the task is done.

items.name: Afterimage
items.lore: This wand is capable of attacks so fast that it appears to flicker in and out of existence. Anyone able to access its full potential will be seen as only a blur to their enemies.

items.name: Clearsight Spectacles
items.quest: Realm of Light IV - Finding the Light
items.lore: Ancient magicks are required to make these brilliant glasses, imbued with charity and selflessness. They allow sight beyond sight, rumoured to allow sight of a brilliant realm.

items.name: Phantasmal Remnants
items.lore: Memories take on lives of their own, left long enough.

items.name: Adamantite
items.lore: Adamantite is a soft metal often added to exotic medicine to increase one's health, but a revolutionary blacksmith on Black Road, created a chestplate with an Adamantite alloy, which is advertised to bolster the users endurance.

items.name: Afelis's Locket
items.lore: A golden locket Afelis always carried with them. Inside is a picture of Afelis embracing a woman in the Detlas square. 'A+E' is inscribed on the front.

items.name: Anarchy
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Aphorism
items.lore: Just because it's been said to death doesn't mean it isn't true.

items.name: Blade of Shade
items.lore: The fabled weapon of the titular dark Assassin, the blade's small stature hides its true powers. Shadows undulate about the hilt.

items.name: Blood Moon
items.lore: Imbued with the blood of the first werewolf, it was kept in Gelibord as a trophy before being stolen. Wearing it is said to mimic the effects of the lycanthropic curse.

items.name: Chakram
items.lore: Despite appearing as a basic blade when held, strange spiritual magic changes its form into a sharp, ring-like cutting edge when used to attack. Only one person was known to master the weapon's abilities.

items.name: Ethereal
items.lore: Supposedly based off of the wand of master mage Ethe, this wand is plated with magic-focusing jewels and heavy gold, yet somehow remains entirely weightless.

items.name: Helm Splitter
items.lore: One of Skien's many deadly weapons. This warhammer, despite the massive weight of the hammerhead, was able to be swung by Skien fast enough to be a blur.

items.name: Maelstrom
items.lore: Lost by master sailor Carvel in a massive storm, it was carried all the way out to the city of Selchar, where it was found spewing seafoam and lightning bolts.

items.name: Scythe
items.lore: A psychopath claiming herself to be Death incarnate used this dark-bladed scythe on a killing spree that lasted over a year. It reaped hundreds of lives, including her own.

items.name: Stave of the Legends
items.lore: Crafted exclusively by the Temple of the Legends' mages, this stave is honorary to Mages who best the Temple's Grand Magus.

items.name: Toaster
items.lore: This peculiar weapon was once wielded by the firey warrior Igbar, who used it to great effect in endurance competitions.

items.name: Archangel
items.lore: The unwieldy, yet imposing stature of this massive sickle strikes awe into those who view it. Those who have the will to wield it, however, seem to garner respect from all those around them, as though they had become a god.

items.name: Crystal
items.lore: Forged on Mage Island, the sparkling liquid-like armour is as hard as obsidian, but light and fluid as water. It glistens with the magic of the ocean winds.

items.name: Stifling Spores
items.lore: The beauty of this peculiar grotto takes your breath away. Unfortunately, its spores do too...

items.name: The Jingling Jester
items.lore: Jingle jangle, while shaking your bells. Jingle jangle come the pockets of cash... Catch the trickster, send them to hell," their money is gone and off you've dashed!

items.name: Blue Mask
items.lore: The Blue Mask's physical traits are equal to that of paper, but the mystical properties enhance the wearers personal skills tenfold. The mask is thought to originate from an ancient Dernel tribe.

items.name: Blighted Seraph
items.lore: Your saviour is not coming.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Stalagmites
items.lore: Although these boots are crafted from corrupted stone, they do not exhibit any corruptive effects on their wearers. Speculation abounds as to the reason.

items.name: Impact Winter
items.lore: Do you think you can survive with a sky choked by snow and ash? More importantly, do you think anything else can?

items.name: Jungle Rogue
items.lore: King of the Jungle-it's a title reserved for the apex of the apex, and yet from where you swing across the canopy, this beast of supposed royalty is but another victim of your thievish pursuits.

items.name: Remikas' Authority
items.lore: This plain-looking silver bracer is one of the last surviving heirlooms of the first Gavellian king, to be passed down to his heirs. The shimmering metal is said to contain Remikas' soul within it.

items.name: Sodeta Boots
items.lore: These boots were standard issue to members of the prestigious, and now disbanded, Sodeta Guild, and given as a gift to the owners of Delnar Mansion one day.

items.name: Heaven's Gate
items.lore: Among the outcasts of Efilim, some preach that death is not to be feared. They say while the road to his door is hellish, and his messenger most cruel, the beyond forgives. In this gilded spear, you see not only a weapon, but a key, a ticket. You know what to do. Be the messenger.

items.name: Hesperium
items.lore: Watch as they receive your gift of imminent disaster and endless fallout.

items.name: Infernus Aeterna
items.lore: From coals to conflagration, the flames of War flicker forever.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Phage Pins
items.lore: Salvaged from the limbs of the Vulcor Adrenophage, they radiate extreme heat,  suffusing the body they attach to with that same heat. It almost feels as though your blood is heating to a frenetic boil.

items.name: Pure
items.lore: Carved directly from the mysterious rock that hit Gavel 50 years ago, this pure white wand glows with cosmic energy unknown.

items.name: Spectre
items.lore: The dark spectres of the decayed forests have created an insidious helmet to drain the spirit of those who wear it, and become servants to their dark whims. Many have fallen to its allure.

items.name: The Eviscerator
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: The Exile
items.lore: This indestructible dagger was found floating in the magma of the Molten Heights, with a lament from its exiled smith carved onto the hilt.

items.name: Unspeakable
items.lore: The wielders of this cursed glassen bauble are rendered mute. The effect is reversed after the item is removed, but the longer it is worn, the longer the curse remains.

items.name: Call to Concord
items.lore: Reverberating with the bravery and residual strength of fallen Wynn soldiers, every casualty only serves to harden the resolve it instills in the wearer.

items.name: Cloak of Luminosity
items.quest: Realm of Light III - A Headless History

items.name: Kelight's Shield
items.lore: Used by the Temple of the Legends' strongest guard, the shielded plating is enchanted with a powerful ward to stave off the effects of the corruption.

items.name: Ohms' Wish
items.lore: "If anyone finds this, leave it at my Gale's gravesite. I promised her a memento, too." This inscription is extremely weathered.

items.name: Roiling Ruckus
items.lore: Not knowing what's going on is the best part!

items.name: Augoeides
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Millennium
items.lore: Cosmic energy permeates this deceptively dull-looking chestplate, having been crafted with stardust from a comet that only passes over Wynn every 1000 years.

items.name: Remikas' Righteousness
items.lore: Despite this mace never seeing use by Remikas, it was seen as a symbol of the might of his rule over Gavel. Its true abilities in battle have never been seen.

items.name: Carnage Agglomerate
items.lore: Behind you are the corpses of the weak, of those who deserved to die. Before you are those willing to join them.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Clairvoyance
items.lore: The powerful psychic energies surrounding this bow are rumored to increase accuracy, though this has not been refuted by any reliable source.

items.name: Abysso Galoshes
items.lore: Rumored to be crafted from a Dernic stone, these sinister boots radiate extremely powerful dark energy. They have absorbed the power of the raging seas in their time locked in Sarnfic.

items.name: Apex Predator
items.lore: Something must always rule the ecosystem, even one as warped as this.

items.name: Atavistic
items.lore: In the wake of the Decay, the land yearns to return to its old vibrance.

items.name: Bad Wolf
items.lore: The runic message carved on these enigmatic boots cover hundreds of different languages, many of them disused, but what has been translated seems to describe a disaster soon to arrive to the world.

items.name: Extinction
items.lore: The Decay swept away countless species. As those memories die, they are lost forever.

items.name: Eyes on All
items.lore: A presence of despair watches over the swamp as the Decay spreads.

items.name: Homeorhesis
items.lore: Stability is not necessarily found in stasis, but predictability.

items.name: Kahontsi Ohstyen
items.lore: Wielded by the chief of the Tromsian jungle's zombie tribes, the augmentable crystals within it focus natural elemental energies to intense levels.

items.name: Plague Staff
items.lore: Carried by the Olux Plague Doctor, this simple-looking stick subtly oozes with an unidentifiable substance that is invigorating to the holder, and lethally venomous to anything else.

items.name: Stronghold
items.lore: The cost of survival is immense, with morale running thin and supply lines choked, feeding the strength of an army condensed to a single point, of a people desperate not to give an inch.

items.name: Symbiont
items.lore: Survival is the shared interest of those in the wilds.

items.name: Terminal Velocity
items.lore: Don't give them time for even a warning.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Antimony
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Masochist
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Omnia Mors
items.lore: Everything dies. Show those who resist the foolishness of their ambitions.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Rycar's Elation
items.lore: Created from the lip of a wine bottle and dropped in the mystic waters of Lake Gylia, this glass ring seems to follow Rycar's drunken escapades wherever she wanders.

items.name: Soundwave
items.lore: This bow's thick string fails to shoot arrows effectively, but instead produces low frequency sound waves that erupt from the source in all directions. The sound can implode the eardrums of an enemy with a single strum.

items.name: Diablo
items.lore: One of the most unstable wands known to man. Using the bark of the Flerisi trunk, it reaps fiery destruction upon its enemies.

items.name: Kratke
items.lore: Spurred on by a drunken bet, the great Thanos smith Kratke improved a pair of leggings from a rival that were once thought to be perfection.

items.name: Cage of Bones
items.lore: The ancient bones of the demon Garaheth are stronger than steel. They clamp down when worn to constrict the bearer, inciting a slow madness.

items.name: Heat Death
items.lore: Everything slowly loses heat, and will eventually stop moving. Are you prepared?

items.name: Locrian
items.lore: Skien's trust in others was shattered permanently by the wielder of this dagger, who fell to the corruption and attacked his legion during a great corrupted siege.

items.name: Call of the Void
items.lore: Originating from the unspeakable dark land, looking into the helmet will show nothing but darkness. Wearing it is said to reverse your morality, as if it were draining your will to live into the void.

items.name: Fierte
items.lore: Only the most honourable warriors of Gavel's army are presented the fearsome, fiery spear forged from the rarest metals of the Molten Heights.

items.name: Isostatic Rebound
items.lore: Death is naught but an inconvenience for the strongest of the corrupted. With time, the weight of destruction will pass, and the fires of War will rise anew from within.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Lodestone
items.lore: The magical oddity known as lodestone has been studied for years as an active counterpart to quartz's passive magical properties. Research continues, but it is valuable when creating magical items.

items.name: Attrition
items.lore: Outrun. Outsmart. Outlast.

items.name: Crumbling Foundation
items.lore: It always returns a little weaker than what it was before. Perhaps someday, it'll be put down for good.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Infinity
items.lore: If you reach for ammunition from your quiver, as long as you have a single arrow, you will find you never run out.

items.name: Matryoshka Shell
items.lore: The armor worn by the enigmatic Matryoshka Idol. It appears to have a nearly uncountably high number of inlets and sockets set inside.

items.name: Molten Fleshmass
items.lore: The scorching heat, the shifting bodies, the screeching cries of anguish... they're all the least of your problems now.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Olux's Prized Bow
items.lore: This expertly crafted bow was whittled by a cryptid-researching fanatic. Its frame was cut from the very toughest tree roots.

items.name: Olux's Prized Dagger
items.lore: This expertly crafted dagger was smithed by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It can chop through even the thickest of the swamp's clay with ease.

items.name: Olux's Prized Relik
items.lore: This expertly crafted relik was notched by a cryptid-researching fanatic. Its feathers and baubles chime with a soothing melody.

items.name: Olux's Prized Spear
items.lore: This expertly crafted spear was forged by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It shines brilliantly in even the weakest sunlight.

items.name: Olux's Prized Wand
items.lore: This expertly crafted wand was shaped by a cryptid-researching fanatic. It shimmers with the purest water from the swamp.

items.name: Repose
items.lore: Found on the mangled body of a famous Tromsian general fallen to a corrupted siege some time ago, these boots allow the wearer to remain calm and steadfast in the face of overwhelming odds.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Sludge Slicer
items.lore: Many who venture into the jungle are swallowed by the thick undergrowth and are never seen again. This weapon and an accompanying skeleton were found inside the very adversary the spear was meant to vanquish as a perfect display of its owner's untimely demise.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Venison
items.lore: This ancient Elven sacrificial mask contains only a sliver of its previous magic, yet the blessing of the Elven god Entia still greatly empowers those who don it.

items.name: Anaklusmos
items.lore: Legends whisper of an incredible blade, that ripples the ground and shatters the tide. Formed from the waves of the sea, it's said all who wield it are untouchable. This, however... appears to just be a regular old pen?

items.name: Bough of Fir
items.lore: Crafted from Mandragora roots and adorned with decorative wreaths of Elven pines, these wands are utilized in Efilim's solstice festivals to celebrate each passing year of Villager and Elven comradery.

items.name: Impulse
items.lore: Prolonged exposure to the corruption may cause sudden bursts of madness in soldiers. To assure themselves of their sanity, some have even begun to play tricks on their brethren.

items.name: Living Slime
items.lore: It turns out that having an acidic, slightly corrupted slime attached to your hands has benefits in combat... still, you should probably get that stuff taken off before it eats the flesh away from your fingerbones.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Anchoryl
items.lore: Despite being a much smaller settlement compared to the mighty citadel of Rodoroc, the dwarven smiths of Thanos still can forge mighty products, such as these heavy diamond-alloy boots.

items.name: Buoyant Balmorals
items.lore: These are congealed and rather gross, but they leave you with an undeniable bounce in your step.

items.name: Jinxed Coif
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Luminis
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Ohms' Rage
items.lore: These ancient, spark-coursing greaves are all that remains of the great thunder mage Ohms' favorite golem familiar after a dark force turned it against its masters.

items.name: Purity Filter
items.lore: Originally intended to remove corruption from the world in small amounts, the item became ineffective after overuse. Traces of corruption linger in the metal, displaying the futility of attempting such a feat.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Scarlet Veil
items.lore: You're seeing red... Time to see more of it.

items.name: Scumlord
items.lore: Ooze secretes out of every inch of this quarterstaff. Is it simply just more of the slime harassing travelers in the jungle, or is there something sinister at play?It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Shine Suffocator
items.lore: The radiance of your foes burns bright. You must emanate your brilliance in return. Cloak them in a blinding glow. Smother their luminance with yours. Then after all of their light has faded, yours will too.

items.name: Bloodbag
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Bridge of the Divide
items.lore: These leggings hold the interest of many researching the corruption, as they are the only documented case of a non-corrupt fusion of dark and light energy, made of pure twilight.

items.name: Empathy Purge
items.lore: Tiny spikes lining the inside of these boots suppress the grey matter in the wearer's brain, enhancing their capabilities and making them capable of murderous and immoral acts while in this trance-like, numbed state.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Hecatomb
items.lore: For the hundreds sacrificed for Troms's survival, death was not the end. Residual dark magic and corrupted energy manifests in this weapon as faint echoes of sorrow and agony from the slain who were denied peace.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Hexed Amulet
items.lore: Although the warlock's curse placed upon this simple, Olux-crafted charm will reduce the abilities of the wearer significantly, its original luck-bolstering properties still are in place.

items.name: Jagged Bone Necklace
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Reaper of Soul
items.lore: A grave digger uncovered this blade from the resting place of a notorious pirate that pillaged the islands of the ocean for four decades.

items.name: Binding Brace
items.lore: An oppressively dark aura emanates from this shackle, dampening both the will and magic potency of those that wear it.

items.name: Broken Balance
items.lore: Torn scraps of metal line the inside of these boots. They provide no protection, instead forcing a constant adrenaline rush while worn.

items.name: Cremation
items.lore: The dead are often burned to nullify the risk of return. For creatures of corruption, however, that fire can be enough for them to rise again.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Decaybound Spindle
items.lore: Decay spreads unseen, but you know it spreads, and that is enough.

items.name: Hero's Mask
items.lore: It bears the visage of a great hero. Thank you for participating in the Festival of the Heroes!

items.name: Marius' Prison
items.lore: "I know the Beast may return one day...but these chains shall bind it for eternity." The inscription glows bright in the darkness.

items.name: Ragni's Mail
items.lore: One of the few remaining standard issue mails that were used against the first hordes to emerge from the infamous portal over 1000 years ago.

items.name: Sealight Prism
items.lore: The light refracted through this sceptre shows you visions. You see the endless waves reflected in its rainbows, cracking hulls and drowning towns. This prism allows you to channel a fraction of the sea's potential.

items.name: Eruption
items.lore: No one expected the WynnExcavation volcanic site to produce any valuable materials, but this heavy, obsidian-blend bow silenced the critics.

items.name: Rigor Mortis
items.lore: After this crossbow's original wielder fell in battle, its mechanisms stiffened and locked into place. A spark of life, or undeath, can temporarily reverse the effect before the weapon seizes up again.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Sawdust
items.lore: Once cursed by a druid who had his grove chopped away by a greedy Villager, it was then purified and mass-produced for sale as armor, to the druid's utter disappointment.

items.name: Fissure
items.lore: Dwarven folklore tells of this mighty maul, used by gods to break mountains, shape continents, and crack the earth to form caverns.

items.name: Arterial Spray
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Sage
items.lore: Discipline and experience is channeled into these wands for 10 years in the Bantisu monastery of the canyon, in the hope that they will pass on its teachings to less experienced users.

items.name: Shinespark
items.lore: There have been many attempts to create a reliable power system in Llevigar, and this plasma-charged helmet was reforged from a notable prototype.

items.name: Temporal Lantern
items.lore: No eyes see past the dark fog that enshrouds the future. But if you could perhaps light the way, what would you see? Invigorating hope? Or a warning to be heeded?

items.name: Brainbleed
items.lore: An otherwise healthy soldier once writhed and collapsed in the confines of an outpost. His autopsy was quickly canceled when military doctors noticed an unusually rapid spread of corruption in his corpse.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Megalophobia
items.lore: Each level deeper into the ocean only harbors stranger and more eerie creatures than before. Though their alien nature is disquieting, it is the way the trend sees no end that worries you the most.

items.name: Woebegone
items.lore: For some, the psychological impact of the undead incursions becomes too much to bear. They leave their lives behind hoping to find solace, only to return as an undead themselves.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Aestival Solstice
items.lore: Enjoy the sun that has graced you with its longest daylight, and cherish it so that you can carry forth its warmth.

items.name: Bloodied Wreath
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Bob's Battle Chestplate
items.lore: This battered chestplate was once worn by the legendary Wynnic protector, Bob, during the fearsome corrupted sieges before he gave it away to an old friend. An air of melancholy hangs over it.

items.name: Cerid's Ingenuity
items.lore: One of the master tinkerer Cerid's greatest inventions, these odd gear-laced boots clink and chime with the sound of clockworks keeping its powerful magic dynamos constantly running.

items.name: Deadeye
items.lore: The weapon of the fearsome lone bandit, Rymek Luke, it is unique in that it is designed to fire small metal rounds instead of more traditional projectiles.

items.name: Inclemency
items.lore: Only the strongest are able to survive Nesaak's unforgivingly harsh conditions. From the frigid temperatures to the vicious wildlife and grotesque corrupteds, life here can feel like challenge after challenge.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Oyster
items.lore: This item was named by someone from the community!

items.name: Dissever
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Lingering Twilight
items.lore: In the harshest reaches of the mountains, dusk brings a gentle magic to the air, prolonging the faintest vestiges of sundown before night truly falls.

items.name: Mutilated Corpse
items.lore: Freshly slain foes in well below freezing conditions often provide enough warmth to weather the storm. However, this Corrupted seems to still be alive in some sickening way, draining life force to sustain itself.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Pulsar
items.lore: The density of this weapon is almost immeasurable. Despite being light and easy to wield, the spear seems to have its own gravitational pull, slowly dragging enemies closer and making it nearly impossible to put down.

items.name: Scorpion
items.lore: This dagger has no blade. Instead, it is layered with the stingers of the Black Shadow Scorpion, which has the ability to vanish entirely from its prey.

items.name: Seven-League Boots
items.lore: Bending the fabric of reality to allow the wearer to take massive strides, these boots are rumored to contain rogue djinni to power them.

items.name: Winter's Essence
items.lore: These pure, snow-white leggings are rumored to have been crafted by the legendary ice mage Theorick. The people of Nesaak view them as cursed, seeking to destroy them in a bid to stop the endless winter surrounding them.

items.name: Dogfight
items.lore: The Nesaak wolves have been driven to aggression by corruption. Witnesses have seen entire packs decimate each other in fierce and brutal skirmishes. This necklace is adorned with teeth recovered from those incidents, and wearing it gives you the feeling of a wolf about to bite at your neck.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Enhanced DuskShield
items.lore: They look extremely bulky and uncomfortable...do they have a right to call it "enhanced"?

items.name: Giant's Bracer
items.lore: This ill-fitting, bulky chestplate was never intended to be a chestplate at all. Rather, it is a broken fragment of an arm bracer, from the time of giants.

items.name: Pelier
items.lore: Occasional whisperings can be heard by the wearers of this stone mask, reforged from a phylactery of souls. Although not dangerous, staring into the eyes of the mask can bring fear of one's soul being trapped within.

items.name: Thunderbolt
items.lore: This bow has no string. Instead, a thin lightning-like thread is strung upon it. It is said to be limited only by the speed of the user.

items.name: Blazing Bangle
items.lore: This bracelet is imbued with both the oppressive heat of the mesa sun and the embers of an extinguished corrupted flame. It is known to spontaneously ignite anything that touches it for too long.It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Bluetooth
items.lore: Forged from the fang of a ferocious beast. Despite its small size, it can land blows at considerable range.

items.name: Enhanced Assassin's Hood
items.lore: The chains comprising the mesh are rusty and old. It looks terrible, especially with the newer metal added on.

items.name: Glare
items.lore: The blazing sun has been revered by many druidic sects as a god in its own right, and the jewel in this brilliant wand glows with the brightness of their holy star.

items.name: Precious
items.lore: A strange magic attracts you to this ring. Maybe you shouldn't tell anyone about its existence?

items.name: Sticky Decoder Ring
items.lore: Each one is welded stuck to just one letter. Apparently, to decode the special Rymek message, you need to buy twenty six. ...do they think you're a fool?

items.name: The Scavenged
items.lore: To the victor go the spoils. To the swift, go the spoils of the victor.

items.name: Upgraded Flare Blitz
items.lore: The weapon nearly catches fire during the merchant's demonstration. He still refuses to discount it despite this.

items.name: Weighted Nimble Fingers
items.lore: The extra metal on the glove completely defeats the purpose... It's unclear why it was re-smithed like this.

items.name: Dune Kiln
items.lore: "You don't really advance much when it comes to ovens. For clay, glass, ceramics...it was perfected a long time ago." -Treous, Almuj Glassblower

items.name: Enhanced Phosphene
items.lore: The paintjob on the armor is incredibly garish. Who thinks to combine sea green, mud, hot pink, and neon yellow?

items.name: Holy Greaves
items.lore: Many blacksmiths have tried to craft their products in this armor's image, but none so far have been able to capture the brilliance of these Bovemist-blessed greaves.

items.name: Scorched Feather
items.lore: The world is at your fingertips. Don't reach too far.

items.name: Spinal Estoc
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Sprout
items.lore: "The plants loathe to take hold upon the red stone. And so, we must hunt instead."  -Caras, Owl Tribesman

items.name: Chaser
items.lore: "My husband's such a scaredy-cat. What good is tomb raiding if you're not in the tomb?"  -Dr. Junes, Almuj Archaeologist

items.name: Clunderthap
items.lore: "It never rains here, but we hear the thunder echoing in the distance."  -Lanu, Almuj Archaeomancer

items.name: Diluted Vitriol
items.lore: The glass capsule holding the poison vial is too cloudy to see what's inside. The merchant's reassurances are anything but.

items.name: Fierce Thunder
items.lore: Every time this spear hits an enemy, a sharp electrical jolt hits the users hands that forces powerful lightning to release.

items.name: Hashr Claw
items.lore: "Betrayal stings sharper than a scorpion's tail, and festers worse than the poison inside."   -Attributed to Hashr

items.name: Karma
items.lore: "When payback is the rule of the land, it feels safest to do nothing."  -Ormrod, Self-exiled Almuj Resident

items.name: Nevermore
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Springtrap
items.lore: "After nearly getting trapped in an iron maiden, I figure I can study  those mummies just as well from home." -Achper, Almuj Archaeologist

items.name: Treachery
items.lore: ...It's pulling towards something.

items.name: Chained Pixels
items.lore: Materials of all sorts have been lashed together in this crude, blocky set of leggings. From darksteel to leather to rotting wood, each part is a perfect square. It has, so far, been impossible to recreate.

items.name: Enhanced Salience
items.lore: Adding hard metal onto a religious cap seems blasphemous to you. The merchant disagrees.

items.name: Enhanced Zeal
items.lore: Supposedly this chestplate belonged to a legendary paladin. The merchant has no explanation for why there are dozens of them.

items.name: Influence
items.lore: This knife does not belong in your hands... yet somehow it feels right at home.

items.name: Jaw Breaker
items.lore: "Bandit attacks losing you sleep? Free fighting classes here! Only 10 emeralds- they won't know what hit 'em!" -Almuj Self-Defense Class Advertisement

items.name: Lurking Peril
items.lore: The dense, frostbitten trees hide danger at every step, too far to see yet too close to escape.

items.name: Miasma
items.lore: "I have to wonder just how healthy slime found in the depths of a desert  cavern can be to drink." -Eluzterp, Almuj resident

items.name: Mummy's Rag
items.lore: The accursed mummy once wore this robe as a great pharaoh of the desert. It has long since rotted, leaving only a cursed shell of its former greatness.

items.name: Upgraded HellRaiser
items.lore: The blade is covered in tape that's been scribbled on in order to make it look fiery. This doesn't seem like a wise purchase.

items.name: Upgraded Long Bow
